Fold the fish pieces, prawns and dill through the sauce – it will seem quite thick, but the fish releases some juices while baking. Spread the fish mixture carefully into a shallow 8-cup (2 litre) ovenproof dish.

Once the potatoes are tender enough to put a skewer easily through them, drain over a colander. Push the potatoes through a potato ricer and mix thoroughly with 50g of the butter and the remaining ¾ cup of milk. Season to taste with salt and pepper. The potato should be a good spreading consistency.

Spoon the potato evenly over the top of the fish mixture. Use a fork to make a swirling pattern, creating peaks and troughs in the potato. Cut the remaining butter into small pieces and scatter over the potato.

Place the fish pie onto a baking tray and bake for 30 minutes or until some of the peaks are darkly golden, the troughs are light golden, and in some places the sauce is bubbling up through the potato.
Serve fish pie with a wedge of lemon and salad leaves, if you like.

recipes.title: Mediterranean-style seafood stew
recipes.description: Grate lemon or lime zest over the stew for extra zing!

ingredients.name: gram salmon, skinned, boned and diced
ingredients.raw: 250 gram salmon, skinned, boned and diced

ingredients.name: sea salt, cracked pepper, capers and parsley to serve
ingredients.raw: sea salt, cracked pepper,  capers and parsley to serve

ingredients.name: chopped fresh herbs, such as rosemary, thyme and parsley
ingredients.raw: 1 tablespoon chopped fresh herbs, such as rosemary, thyme and parsley

steps: Combine the onion, celery, one tin of tomatoes, capsicum, garlic, thyme, stock and half the prawns in a large lidded casserole dish or slow cooker. Cook at 160°C for 3 hours in the oven or 4 hours on medium in the slow cooker.
Remove the prawns with a slotted spoon and squeeze out any prawn meat from the shells, then add prawn meat back to the broth (discard shells).

Add the remaining tin of tomatoes and prawns, fish, salmon and drained beans, season well and continue to cook for a further 1 hour in the oven or 1½ hours in the slow cooker or until the fish is cooked.
Garnish with capers and garlic and herb bread and sprinkle with parsley.
Combine butter, garlic and herbs.
Slice a French stick into chunky pieces and spread with the butter, then cook in a preheated oven at 180°C for 4-5 minutes until golden and toasted.

recipes.title: Easy, cheesy potato bake
recipes.description: This versatile, creamy potato bake is always a winner - serve it as a side dish or by itself!

ingredients.name: kilogram sebago potatoes, cut into 5mm-thick slices
ingredients.raw: 1 kilogram sebago potatoes, cut into 5mm-thick slices

steps: Preheat oven to 200°C (180°C fan-forced). Grease 2-litre (8-cup) ovenproof dish.
Boil, steam or microwave potato until tender; drain.
Meanwhile, heat oil in medium frying pan; cook onion and pancetta, stirring, until onion softens and pancetta is crisp.
Combine cream, sour cream and chives in medium jug.

Layer a third of the potato slices over base of dish; sprinkle with half the pancetta mixture. Pour a third of the cream mixture over pancetta mixture; sprinkle with a third of the cheese. Repeat layering, finishing with cheese.
Bake, uncovered, in oven, about 30 minutes or until browned lightly. Stand 10 minutes before serving.

recipes.title: Ricotta and spinach pasta shell bake
recipes.description: A rich and gooey bake for the whole family.

ingredients.name: finely chopped fresh flat-leaf parsley
ingredients.raw: 2 tablespoon finely chopped fresh flat-leaf parsley

steps: Cook pasta in large saucepan of boiling water, 3 minutes; drain. Cool 10 minutes.
Preheat oven to 180°C/160°C fan-forced.
Boil, steam or microwave spinach until wilted; drain. Chop spinach finely; squeeze out excess liquid.
Combine spinach in large bowl with ricotta and herbs; spoon mixture into pasta shells.
Combine sauce and stock in oiled shallow 2-litre (8-cup) ovenproof dish. Place pasta shells in dish; sprinkle with parmesan.
Bake, covered, about 50 minutes or until pasta is tender. Bake, uncovered, 10 minutes or until browned lightly. Remove from oven; stand 10 minutes.

recipes.title: Tomato, mozzarella and chickpea pan bake
recipes.description: The family will love this simple one-pot vegie meal.

ingredients.name: crusts removed, torn into 2cm pieces
ingredients.raw: 1/2 loaf ciabatta, crusts removed, torn into 2cm pieces
3/4 cup coarsely chopped fresh flat-leaf parsley

steps: Preheat oven to 220°C.

Place bread on a baking-paper-lined oven tray. Squeeze seeds and juices from tomatoes over bread; place tomatoes on tray. Drizzle with half the oil; season to taste. Roast 15 minutes, stirring occasionally or until bread is golden and tomatoes soft.

Meanwhile, using a potato masher, lightly crush chickpeas in a large bowl; season. Whisk in ricotta, eggs, garlic, parsley and three quarters of the parmesan until combined. Stir in capers, olives and half the tomato mixture. Season.

Heat remaining oil in an ovenproof 26cm heavy based frying pan over medium heat until very hot. Immediately add egg mixture; top with remaining tomato mixture and parmesan. Cook 8 minutes or until browned around the edge and half set.

Cover loosely with baking paper; bake in the oven 15 minutes or until set. Stand bake 5 minutes. Invert onto a large plate; flip onto a second large plate right-way up. Serve topped with mozzarella and basil. Drizzle with a little extra oil, if you like.

recipes.title: Chicken and risoni pasta bake
recipes.description: Bake it till you make it.

ingredients.raw: 1/2 cup coarsely chopped fresh flat-leaf parsley

steps: Preheat oven to 180°C/375°F. Oil a 3-litre (12-cup) ovenproof dish.

Heat oil in a large frying pan over medium heat;cook onion and garlic, stirring, 4 minutes or until onion softens. Add wine; bring to the boil. Boil, uncovered, until liquid is reduced by half. Stir in the water, crushed tomatoes and pasta; bring to the boil.
Place chicken and semi-dried tomatoes in dish. Pour pasta mixture over chicken. Bake 15 minutes.

Increase oven to 200°C/400°F. Stir cream, peas and spinach into pasta mixture; season to taste. Top with combined cheddar and parsley. Bake a further 20 minutes or until browned. Stand 10 minutes before serving.

recipes.title: Salmon Niçoise tray bake
recipes.description: Save washing up!

ingredients.name: extra virgin olive oil
ingredients.raw: ¼ cup (60ml) extra virgin olive oil

ingredients.name: x150g salmon fillets, skin on, pin-boned, skin scored
ingredients.raw: 4 x150g salmon fillets, skin on, pin-boned, skin scored

steps: Preheat oven to 200°C/400°F. Line a large roasting pan with baking paper.
Place potato and garlic in lined pan; drizzle with 1 tablespoon of the oil and season. Roast for 20 minutes.
Meanwhile, cook beans in a saucepan of boiling water for 2 minutes; remove using a slotted spoon and refresh under cold water. Reserve until required.

Bring water in pan back to the boil. Break one egg into a cup, then slide into pan; repeat with remaining eggs. When all eggs are in the pan, return water to the boil. Cover pan, then turn off heat; stand for 4 minutes or until a light film of egg white sets over yolks. Remove one egg at a time using a slotted spoon; place on paper towel to drain.
Add tomatoes and olives to roasting pan; drizzle with remaining oil. Stir to mix well; roast for 10 minutes.

Push tomato mixture to one side of pan; add seasoned salmon to other side, skin-side down, making sure salmon sits directly on pan. Roast salmon for 2 minutes; turn and roast for a further 2 minutes or until cooked to your liking.

Add green beans and eggs to pan; season to taste. Drizzle with salsa verde. Serve with remaining [salsa verde](https://www.womensweeklyfood.com.au/recipes/salsa-verde-8088|target="_blank") to the side.

recipes.title: Pork parmigiana bake
recipes.description: Deliciously easy!

ingredients.raw: 1/3 cup loosely packed fresh cress or baby basil leaves

steps: Spray eggplant on both sides with cooking oil; cook on a heated grill plate (or grill or barbecue) over high heat for 2 minutes on each side or until browned and tender.

Meanwhile, preheat grill. Place prosciutto on an oven tray lined with baking paper. Grill for about 3 minutes or until prosciutto is browned and crisp. Remove from grill; cover to keep warm. Leave grill on.

Meanwhile, heat half the oil in a shallow 2-litre (8-cup) flameproof baking dish over medium-high heat. Season pork; cook for 1 minute on each side or until almost cooked. Remove from heat. Remove pork from dish.
Slice bocconcini thinly. Add tomatoes to dish; place pork on top. Top pork with eggplant and bocconcini.
Place baking dish under grill; cook for about 3 minutes or until bocconcini melts and pork is cooked through.
To serve, spoon tomato over the pork stacks, top with prosciutto and cress; drizzle with remaining oil.

recipes.title: Chicken maryland bake
recipes.description: You'll love this easy one pot dinner.

ingredients.name: streaky bacon, cut into strips
ingredients.raw: 6 rashers streaky bacon, cut into strips

steps: Preheat oven to 180°C.
Toss chicken pieces in flour, shaking off excess. In a flameproof casserole dish, heat 2 tablespoons of the oil on high. Brown chicken each side for 2-3 minutes. Remove from pan.
In same pan, heat remaining oil on high. Saute bacon, onion and garlic for 3-4 minutes until beginning to brown. Add half the grapes, olives, capers and oregano. Cook, stirring, for 2 minutes.
Pour in wine and bring to boil. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 1-2 minutes until reduced by half. Stir in brussels sprouts and stock. Return chicken to pan with remaining grapes.

Bake for 20-25 minutes, until chicken is cooked through. Serve accompanied with mashed potato.
[jwp-video n="1"]

recipes.title: Eggplant bolognese bake
recipes.description: For a great low-carb version of lasagne, this hearty and delicious eggplant bolognese is perfect.

ingredients.raw: 1/3 cup (25g) coarsely grated parmesan cheese bolognese sauce
1/2 cup loosely packed fresh basil leaves

steps: For bolognese sauce, heat oil in medium frying pan; cook onion, capsicums and garlic, stirring, until onion softens. Add mince to pan; cook, stirring, until mince changes colour. Add chopped tomato and tomato paste; cook, stirring, 3 minutes. Stir in wine and undrained tomatoes; bring to the boil. Reduce heat; simmer, uncovered, about 25 minutes or until sauce thickens. Remove from heat; stir in herbs.
Meanwhile, cut eggplants into 2mm slices; cook on heated oiled grill plate (or grill or barbecue) until just tender.
Preheat oven to 180°C/160°C fan-forced.
Boil, steam or microwave spinach until wilted; drain. Cool 10 minutes; using hands, squeeze as much liquid as possible from spinach. Combine spinach, ricotta and egg white in medium bowl.

Spread 1 cup of the sauce over base of shallow 2-litre (8-cup) ovenproof dish. Top with half of the eggplant, then half of the spinach mixture, then another cup of sauce, remaining eggplant and remaining spinach mixture. Spread remaining sauce over the top then sprinkle with combined mozzarella and parmesan.
Bake bolognese bake, uncovered, about 20 minutes or until top browns lightly. Stand 10 minutes.
Meanwhile, for rocket salad, place rocket and basil in medium bowl with combined vinegar and oil; toss gently to combine.
Divide bolognese bake among serving plates; serve with rocket salad.

recipes.title: Cheesy cauliflower bake
recipes.description: The best way to eat cauliflower is smothered in plenty of cheesy sauce.

ingredients.name: coarsely chopped fresh flat-leaf parsley
ingredients.raw: 2 tablespoons coarsely chopped fresh flat-leaf parsley

steps: Preheat oven to 200°C/180°C fan.

Cut the leaves and large stem from the cauliflower and throw them away. Break the cauliflower into florets. Place the cauliflower in a large microwave-safe bowl, cover the bowl with plastic wrap. Microwave on HIGH (100%) for about  9 minutes or until the cauliflower is tender when tested with a fork or skewer.
Place milk in a small microwave-safe jug; heat in the microwave on HIGH (100%) for about 30 seconds or until hot.

Meanwhile, heat the butter in  a medium saucepan on the stove over medium heat until melted. Add the flour; stir with a wooden spoon until the mixture becomes a smooth paste. Pour the hot milk in slowly, a little at a time, and stir until the mixture is smooth before adding more milk. Stir the mixture over medium to high heat until it boils and becomes thick.
Take the pan off the heat and add  ½ cup of the cheese; stir the sauce until it is smooth. Add the nutmeg and season to taste with salt and pepper.
Place the cauliflower in a 1.25 litre  (5 cup) dish; pour the cheese sauce over the cauliflower and sprinkle with the remaining cheese. Place the dish on  an oven tray.
Place the tray in the oven; bake for about 30 minutes or until golden. Stand for 10 minutes before sprinkling with parsley to serve.

recipes.title: Snapper and tomato tray bake
recipes.description: This snapper tray bake is an easy meal idea that keeps your dishes to a minimum. With zesty breadcrumb crust and juicy tomato and zucchini baked together, it's an easy one pan meal.

ingredients.name: baby leaf salad, parsley and lemon wedges, to serve
ingredients.raw: baby leaf salad, parsley and lemon wedges, to serve

steps: Preheat the oven to 200°C (180°C fan-forced).
Combine the tomato and zucchini in the base of a medium baking dish; season generously with sea salt flakes and pepper.
Combine the breadcrumbs, rosemary, rind and pepper in a shallow bowl. Press the breadcrumbs onto the fillets.
Arrange crumbed fillets over tomatoes and sprinkle with remaining breadcrumb mixture. Drizzle with the melted butter.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until fish is just cooked through. Cooking time will depend on the thickness of the fillets.
Serve fish with a baby leaf salad, parsley and lemon wedges.

recipes.title: Lentil and tomato bake
recipes.description: This wholesome lentil and tomato bake is perfect for dinner this weekend. Hearty and delicious, this is a dish the whole family will love.

ingredients.name: gram sourdough bread, crust removed and torn into small chunks
ingredients.raw: 400 gram sourdough bread, crust removed and torn into small chunks

steps: Preheat the oven to 180°C (160°C fan-forced).

Heat a large saucepan over a medium heat. Add 1 tablespoon of the oil with garlic, onion, carrot, celery and bay leaf; cook, stirring occasionally, for about 5 minutes or until the onion is golden and the vegetables have softened.

Add the lentils; stir for 1 minute. Stir in the stock and undrained tomatoes. Bring to the boil; reduce heat and simmer, covered, for about 35 minutes or until lentils are tender. Discard the bay leaf; season to taste with freshly ground black pepper.

Spoon the lentil mixture into a 5cm deep 18cm x 25cm baking dish (2.5 litre/10-cup capacity). Put the torn bread and remaining oil into a medium bowl; toss to combine. Cover the lentils with the oiled bread and sprinkle with parmesan. Bake for about 15-20 minutes or until bread and cheese are golden.

recipes.title: Chicken and sweet corn bake
recipes.description: Nourish your body and soul with this comforting chicken and sweet corn bake. Enjoy it straight from the oven for a warming dinner on a cooler winter evening. The kids will love it, too!
steps: Preheat oven to 220°C.
Combine chicken, corn, cheese, cream and onion in a large bowl; season. Spoon mixture into four oiled 1-cup (250ml) ovenproof dishes; sprinkle with breadcrumbs.
Place dishes on an oven tray; bake for 20 minutes or until mixture is heated through and the top is browned lightly. Serve sprinkled with extra green onion, if you like.

recipes.title: Pumpkin bake
recipes.description: This hearty vegetarian dish is so simple and tastes so good you'll soon be adding pumpkin bake to your list of staple recipes.

ingredients.name: kilogram butternut pumpkin, peeled, cut into chunks
ingredients.raw: 1 kilogram butternut pumpkin, peeled, cut into chunks

ingredients.name: chopped coarsely
ingredients.raw: 1/2 cup (100g) pumpkin seed kernels (pepitas), chopped coarsely
1/2 cup (40g) grated pecorino or parmesan cheese

steps: Preheat oven to 220°C (200°C fan-forced).

Combine garlic, rosemary and oil in-a large bowl, and add the pumpkin pieces. Toss in the flavoured oil, season with sea salt and freshly ground black pepper, then place in an ovenproof baking dish. Cover with foil and bake for 30 minutes. Remove foil and bake for a further 25 minutes.
Sprinkle over the pumpkin seeds and grated pecorino. Return to the oven for 10 minutes. Serve sprinkled with parsley.

recipes.title: Zucchini, tomato and ricotta bake

ingredients.name: roughly grated zucchini
ingredients.raw: 3 cup roughly grated zucchini (from about 5 zucchini)

ingredients.name: drained, chopped
ingredients.raw: 1/3 cup (50g) sun-dried tomatoes in oil, drained, chopped

ingredients.name: lemon, rind finely grated, plus grated rind of 1
ingredients.raw: 1 lemon, rind finely grated, plus grated rind of 1/2 lemon extra

steps: Preheat oven to 170°C (150°C fan-forced). Grease a 25cm, 8 cup-capacity pie dish.
Place zucchini and salt in a strainer and toss to combine. Place over a bowl and set aside for 10 minutes to drain. Use your hands to squeeze out as much liquid as possible.
Combine ricotta, parmesan, onion, garlic, dill, sun-dried tomato and lemon rind in a large bowl. Add egg and mix until well combined. Stir in zucchini.
Spoon mixture into prepared dish. Top with cherry tomato and place on a baking tray. Bake for 45-50 minutes, until set.
Meanwhile, combine oil, parsley and extra lemon rind in a small food processor. Season well and process until finely chopped.
Cut ricotta bake into wedges, drizzle with parsley oil and serve.

recipes.title: Lebanese lamb and potato bake
steps: Preheat oven to 200°C (180°C fan forced). Oil small baking dish, line base and sides with baking paper.
Peel and thinly slice potatoes. Combine potato, 1 tablespoon of the oil and coriander in dish, season. Bake, uncovered, 30 minutes.
Meanwhile, peel and finely chop onion. Peel and crush garlic. Combine onion, garlic, lamb, cinnamon, allspice, breadcrumbs and lightly beaten egg in medium bowl, season.
Spread lamb mixture over potato, drizzle with remaining oil. Bake, uncovered, about 20 minutes or until cooked through.
Spread onion marmalade over lamb, sprinkle with raisins and nuts.

recipes.title: Mexican bake
recipes.description: Depending on how many you share it with it's a snack, it's a meal or it's a starter. Whatever you call it, just one bite of that fragrant mexican spiced meat and bean combo on a crispy, hot, cheesy corn chip and you'll surely be calling it delicious.
steps: Empty the beans into a large colander; rinse under cold running water until the water runs clear. Drain well. Peel then finely chop onion. Peel then crush garlic.

Heat the oil in a large saucepan on the stove over medium heat for 1 minute. Add the onion; stir with a wooden spoon for about 5 minutes or until the onion is soft. Increase the heat to high and add the beef to the pan. Cook, stirring, for about 2 minutes or until mince is browned, breaking up any large lumps with the spoon.
Stir the garlic, cumin, ground coriander and oregano into the pan. Cook, stirring, for 1 minute or until fragrant.

Add the undrained canned tomatoes, the beans and the water to the pan; reduce the heat and let it simmer, covered with a lid, for about 30 minutes or until thickened slightly. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
Turn the grill (broiler) on to high.

Spoon the beef mixture into a 1.5-litre (6-cup) shallow ovenproof dish and put the dish on an oven tray. Put the corn chips on top of the beef mixture; sprinkle with the cheese. Place the dish under the grill for about 3 minutes or until the cheese melts and starts to bubble. Sprinkle the bake with the fresh coriander leaves to serve.
You can make the recipe ahead of time up to the end of step 2. You'll need to reheat the beef mixture either on the stove or in the microwave before completing steps 3 and 4.
Serve with store-bought guacamole dip and sour cream.
Add the beef mince to the pan; cook, breaking up any large lumps with the wooden spoon.
Stir the beans and the undrained tomato into the beef mixture.

recipes.title: Leek, bean and mushroom bake
recipes.description: A rich and warming leek, bean and mushroom bake infused with red wine, passata and fresh thyme.
steps: Place beans in medium bowl, cover with water. Stand overnight, drain; rinse  under cold water, drain. Cook beans in medium saucepan of boiling water about 20 minutes or until tender; drain.
Preheat oven to 200°C/400°F.

Heat oil in large flameproof baking dish; cook leek, garlic, mushrooms and celery, stirring, until vegetables soften. Add wine; bring to the boil. Boil, uncovered, until liquid is reduced by half. Add beans, stock, sauce and thyme; bring to the boil.
Cover dish, transfer to oven; bake 30 minutes. Stir in peas; bake, uncovered, about 20 minutes or until sauce thickens slightly. Season to taste; sprinkle with extra thyme. Serve bake with toast.

recipes.title: Ricotta and capsicum bake

ingredients.name: gram drained roasted red capsicum
ingredients.raw: 200 gram (6½ ounces) drained roasted red capsicum (bell pepper)

ingredients.name: loosely packed
ingredients.raw: 3/4 cup fresh basil leaves, loosely packed

steps: Preheat oven to 160°C (180°C fan forced). Oil 22cm (9-inch) round springform pan, line base and side with baking paper.

Peel and crush garlic. Combine cheeses, eggs, egg yolks and garlic in medium bowl, season. Slice capsicum thickly. Spread half the cheese mixture over base of pan, top with capsicum, spinach and ½ cup of the fresh basil. Spread the remaining cheese mixture over basil, drizzle with oil. Bake, uncovered, about 1½ hours or until browned lightly.
Stand bake 30 minutes.
Meanwhile, combine pesto and the water in small bowl. Serve bake drizzled with pesto and sprinkled with remaining basil leaves.

recipes.title: Macaroni tuna bake

ingredients.name: gram canned tuna in spring water, drained, flaked
ingredients.raw: 425 gram canned tuna in spring water, drained, flaked

ingredients.name: finely chopped fresh flat-leaf parsley
ingredients.raw: 1 tablespoon finely chopped fresh flat-leaf parsley

steps: Preheat oven to 180°C. Grease six 375ml ovenproof dishes.
Cook pasta in large saucepan of boiling water until tender; drain.

Meanwhile, melt half the butter in a medium saucepan and add flour. Stir over heat until mixture bubbles and thickens slightly. Gradually stir in milk; continue stirring until sauce boils and thickens. Combine sauce, tuna, peas, shallot, parsley, rind, juice and pasta in large bowl.
Spoon mixture evenly into dishes; sprinkle with combined cheese and breadcrumbs. Finely chop remaining batter and add to top of dishes.
Bake about 30 minutes or until browned lightly. Stand 5 minutes before serving.

recipes.title: Mexican chicken tortilla bake

ingredients.name: medium red capsicum , sliced thinly
ingredients.raw: 1 medium red capsicum (bell pepper) (200g), sliced thinly

ingredients.name: gram canned kidney beans, rinsed, drained
ingredients.raw: 420 gram (13½ ounces) canned kidney beans, rinsed, drained

ingredients.name: gram canned corn kernels, rinsed, drained
ingredients.raw: 310 gram (10 ounces) canned corn kernels, rinsed, drained

steps: Preheat oven to 220°C (200°C fan-forced).

Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium-high heat; cook onion and capsicum, stirring, until tender. Add tomatoes, beans, corn and seasoning; simmer, uncovered, for 10 minutes or until mixture thickens slightly. Add chicken and coriander; cook, stirring, until hot. Season to taste.

Line base and sides of a 20cm (8-inch) spring-form pan with foil or baking paper; place on an oven tray. Line base of pan with one tortilla; top with one-third of the chicken mixture. Repeat layering with remaining tortillas and chicken mixture, finishing with a tortilla; sprinkle with cheese. Bake, uncovered, for 20 minutes or until browned lightly. Stand for 5 minutes before cutting.

recipes.title: Moroccan sweet potato bake
recipes.description: These crispy Moroccan-style sweet potato fries are the perfect side dish.

ingredients.raw: 3/4 cup firmly packed fresh coriander leaves

ingredients.name: kilogram kumara , cut into thick wedges
ingredients.raw: 1.5 kilogram kumara (orange sweet potato), cut into thick wedges

ingredients.name: finely chopped fresh flat-leaf parsley
ingredients.raw: 2 tablespoon finely chopped fresh flat-leaf parsley

steps: Preheat oven to 200°C/400°F. Oil 2-litre (8-cup) ovenproof dish.
Finely grate rind from lemon, you need 2 teaspoons. Squeeze juice from lemon, you need 2 tablespoons. Blend or process coriander, 2 tablespoons of the oil, juice, garlic and spices until smooth.

Combine spice paste, stock and kumara in large bowl; season. Transfer mixture to dish. Cover with foil; bake 1 hour 10 minutes. Remove foil; sprinkle with combined breadcrumbs, parsley, lemon rind and remaining oil. Bake, uncovered, about 20 minutes or until sweet potato is tender. Stand 5 minutes before serving.

recipes.title: Pea and salmon bake

ingredients.name: gram canned pink salmon, drained, skin and bones removed
ingredients.raw: 415 gram canned pink salmon, drained, skin and bones removed

steps: Preheat oven to 200°C.
Cook pasta in a large saucepan of boiling water until just tender; drain.

Melt butter in a medium saucepan. Add flour; cook, stirring, until mixture thickens and bubbles. Gradually stir in milk; stir over medium heat until sauce boils and thickens. Stir in peas, ¼ cup parmesan and ¾ cup cheddar. Season to taste.
Pour sauce mixture with pasta and salmon into an oiled shallow 2.5-litre (10-cup) ovenproof dish; sprinkle with remaining combined cheeses.
Cook uncovered, for 20 minutes or until browned lightly.

recipes.title: Spicy tuna pasta bake

ingredients.name: gram canned tuna in oil, drained, flaked
ingredients.raw: 425 gram canned tuna in oil, drained, flaked

steps: Preheat oven to 220°C (200°C fan-forced).
Cook pasta in a large saucepan of boiling water until tender; drain, reserving ¼ cup cooking water.

Meanwhile, heat oil in a large saucepan over high heat; cook garlic and anchovy, stirring, until fragrant. Stir in sauce, olives, oregano, capers and chilli; simmer, uncovered, 5 minutes. Season to taste. Stir in pasta, tuna and the reserved cooking liquid.
Spoon mixture into 2-litre (8-cup) ovenproof dish; sprinkle with combined cheeses. Bake, uncovered, 15 minutes or until browned lightly. Serve topped with some extra oregano leaves, if you like.

recipes.title: Spicy sausage pasta bake
recipes.description: Tortiglioni, a straight tubular pasta with grooves on the exterior, works well when baked with a chunky sauce, such as this one.
steps: Preheat oven to 180ºC/350ºF.
Cook pasta in large saucepan of boiling water until tender; drain.
Meanwhile, cook sausages in large frying pan until just cooked through. Drain on absorbent paper.
Cook onion, eggplant, capsicum and zucchini, stirring, in same pan until just tender.
Cut sausages into 2cm slices; add to vegetables in pan with sauce and basil, stir to combine.
Combine pasta and sausage mixture in deep 3-litre (12-cup) casserole dish; sprinkle with cheese. Bake about 20 minutes or until browned lightly.

recipes.title: Pumpkin and ricotta bake
recipes.description: A crispy baked pumpkin and ricotta dish that is a great healthy side to go with meaty dishes.

ingredients.name: fresh long red chilli, seeded, sliced
ingredients.raw: 1 fresh long red chilli, seeded, sliced

ingredients.name: chopped coarsely
ingredients.raw: 1/2 cup loosely packed fresh flat-leaf parsley leaves, chopped coarsely

steps: Preheat oven to 220°C/425°F.

Place pumpkin in four shallow 2-cup (500ml) ovenproof pans or dishes with onion, chilli and cinnamon; drizzle with oil. Season; toss to combine. Drop spoonfuls of ricotta onto pumpkin. Roast 25 minutes or until pumpkin is just tender.
Meanwhile, place pine nuts on an oven tray; roast 3 minutes or until browned lightly. Cool.
Place beans in a medium saucepan with enough water to cover; bring to the boil. Reduce heat; simmer, uncovered, over low heat, 20 minutes or until tender; drain.
Combine breadcrumbs, parmesan, rind and extra oil in a small bowl; season.
Sprinkle beans over pumpkin; arrange broccolini on top, then sprinkle with pine nuts and breadcrumb mixture. Roast a further 10 minutes or until breadcrumbs are browned.
Serve bake sprinkled with parsley.

recipes.title: Potato, zucchini and pesto bake
steps: Preheat oven to 200°C. Grease the base and insides of a shallow 1.5-litre ovenproof dish with a brush dipped in some softened butter.
Put the milk, cream and pesto in a large jug and whisk with a fork until combined. Season to taste with pepper.

If you have a V-slicer or mandoline, place the guard on one zucchini and slice thinly. Repeat with remaining zucchini. If you don't have a V-slicer, use a vegetable peeler to slice the zucchini as thinly as possible.

Peel potatoes with a vegetable peeler then slice them thinly using a mandoline, V-slicer or sharp knife. Make small piles of potato slices on a board; cut the piles in half lengthways so they are roughly the same height as the zucchini slices.

Arrange alternate slices of potato and zucchini in the dish so they are standing up on their sides. Pour pesto over the vegetables then sprinkle with cheese. Place the dish on an oven tray; cover with greased foil.

Bake about 30 minutes. Remove the foil and bake for a further 15 minutes. Sprinkle the nuts over the vegetables and return to the oven. Bake a further 15 minutes or until the top is golden and vegetables are tender.

recipes.title: Crispy tofu katsu burgers
recipes.description: With only five ingredients and a couple of pantry staples, these vegetarian burgers are the perfect camping food.

ingredients.name: firm tofu, cut into 6 x 1cm slices
ingredients.raw: 450g firm tofu, cut into 6 x 1cm slices

ingredients.name: extra virgin olive oil
ingredients.raw: ½ cup (125ml) extra virgin olive oil

ingredients.name: brioche hamburger buns with sesame seeds, split
ingredients.raw: 4 brioche hamburger buns with sesame seeds, split

ingredients.name: sriracha or hot sauce, to serve
ingredients.raw: sriracha or hot sauce, to serve

steps: Heat a large cast-iron skillet over medium heat.

Meanwhile, place flour in a shallow bowl; season. In another shallow bowl, lightly beat eggs. Place breadcrumbs in a third shallow bowl. Coat tofu in flour; dip in egg, allow excess to drain off, then coat in breadcrumbs.
Add oil to hot pan to heat (it will heat quickly). Cook crumbed tofu for 2 minutes each side or until golden. Remove with tongs or a slotted spoon; drain on paper towel.
Combine coleslaw mix and mayonnaise in a medium bowl. Divide coleslaw among bun bases; top with one or two pieces of tofu, sriracha to taste and bun tops.

recipes.title: Air fryer mozzarella mushroom burgers
recipes.description: A delicious vegetarian alternative!

ingredients.name: grams fresh mozzarella ball, cut into 4 slices
ingredients.raw: 215 grams fresh mozzarella ball, cut into 4 slices

steps: Place mushrooms, vinegar and oil in a medium bowl; toss to coat. Season.
Preheat a 7-litre air fryer to 180C for 3 minutes.
Taking care, place mushrooms in air fryer basket, cook for 12 minutes, turning halfway through cooking time, until tender.

Spread bun bases with aioli, then top with salad leaves, tomato, mozzarella, mushrooms and pesto; sandwich together with
bun tops.
Serve mushroom burgers with shoestring fries and tomato sauce.

recipes.title: Barbecued spanakopita flatbread
recipes.description: A satisfying spin on Greek spinach & fetta pie, cooked on the barbecue.

ingredients.name: firmly packed baby spinach leaves, chopped
ingredients.raw: 2 ¼ cups (90g) firmly packed baby spinach leaves, chopped

ingredients.name: pine nuts, toasted, chopped coarsely
ingredients.raw: 2 tablespoons pine nuts, toasted, chopped coarsely

steps: Make dough.
Prepare a charcoal barbecue with hood to high heat according to instructions below.
Combine mozzarella, fetta, dill, oregano and spinach in a large bowl. Season.

Turn dough out onto a lightly floured surface. Divide dough into 8 portions. Roll each portion into a 12cm round. Divide cheese mixture between half the rounds, spooning mixture into the centre, leaving a 1cm border. Brush edges with water and top with remaining dough rounds, pressing edges to seal. Brush with oil; season.
Place flatbreads on grill. Cover with hood. Cook for 4 minutes. Turn flatbreads over; cook, covered, for a further 4 minutes or until bread is charred and cooked through.
Meanwhile, make lemon salsa.
Serve flatbread cut in half, with lemon salsa.

recipes.title: Sticky barbecue chicken nibbles
recipes.description: They're coated in a sticky barbecue glaze.

ingredients.name: orange or apple juice
ingredients.raw: ¼ cup (60ml) orange or apple juice

steps: Combine barbecue sauce, juice and mustard in a large bowl; add chicken and toss to coat.
Preheat a 7-litre air fryer to 180°C for 3 minutes.
Taking care, place chicken in the air fryer basket; at 180°C, cook for 20 minutes, basting and turning occasionally, or until cooked through.
Serve chicken brushed with extra barbecue sauce.

recipes.title: Barbecue pork ribs
recipes.description: Try these tasty American-style pork ribs for a casual outdoor gathering. Cook them on the barbecue or if preferred, follow our oven method.

ingredients.name: firmly packed brown sugar
ingredients.raw: ¼ cup firmly packed (55g) brown sugar

ingredients.name: firmly packed brown sugar
ingredients.raw: ½ cup firmly packed (110g) brown sugar

steps: Preheat a barbecue to low-medium heat (150°C). To make spice rub, combine sugar with spices and herbs in a small bowl.

Using paper towel, remove any excess moisture from the ribs. Rub ¼ cup spice mixture all over each rack of ribs. Place a large sheet of baking paper on a double layer of foil, large enough to enclose a rack of ribs, then place ribs on top. Fold up the edges and add 2 tablespoons water to each parcel, then enclose and tightly seal. Place parcels over indirect heat and close the lid; cook, turning every 30 minutes, for 1.5-2 hours or until tender. Alternatively, to cook in the oven see tips below.
BBQ SAUCE: Meanwhile, combine ingredients in a small saucepan, bring to a simmer; cook, stirring occasionally for 8 minutes or until thickened. Season to taste.

Taking care, transfer ribs to an oven tray, remove foil and paper. Brush the top side (meat side) of each rack generously with BBQ sauce. Return ribs, top side facing up, to indirect heat on the grill; close lid and cook for 3 minutes or until browned and slightly charred.
Serve ribs with remaining BBQ sauce and coleslaw, if desired.

recipes.title: Balsamic honey pulled-pork buns
recipes.description: This succulent and tasty pulled pork recipe is perfect for sandwiching between soft rolls with crispy coleslaw and crunchy fries.
steps: Preheat oven to 160°C/325°F.

Season pork. Heat oil in a large heavy-based saucepan over high heat; cook pork 2 minutes each side or until browned. Add onion, garlic and herbs; cook, stirring, 2 minutes or until softened. Add stock and the water; bring to the boil. Cover; cook in oven for 2 hours. Remove the lid; cook a further 1 hour or until pork is tender.
Meanwhile, make cabbage and radish coleslaw. Combine ingredients in a large bowl; season to taste. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
Remove pork from pan, cover with foil; set aside. Strain pan juices into a bowl; reserve 1 cup of the juices.

Make balsamic honey barbecue sauce. Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat; cook onion and garlic, stirring, until softened. Add remaining ingredients and reserved pan juices from pork; bring to the boil. Reduce heat to low; simmer, uncovered, 15 minutes, stirring occasionally, or until reduced by half. Season to taste.
Shred pork and stir through barbecue sauce. Sandwich buns with pork and coleslaw.

recipes.title: Air fryer cheeseburgers
recipes.description: The family will love these hearty homemade burgers.
steps: Using your hands, combine beef, egg, breadcrumbs, barbecue sauce, paprika, garlic and 1 tablespoon of the tomato sauce in a large bowl, then season; mix well. Shape mixture into four patties the same size as the brioche buns; ensure they will all fit into the air fryer basket. Spray all over with cooking spray.

Preheat a 7-litre air fryer to 180˚C/350˚F for 3 minutes.
3

Spray the air fryer basket with cooking spray. Taking care, place patties in the basket; at 180˚C/350˚F, cook for 10 minutes, turning halfway through cooking time, or until browned and cooked through. Transfer to a plate and top each with a slice of cheddar; cover loosely with foil to keep warm.
Arrange bacon in the air fryer basket. Reset the temperature to 200˚C/400˚F; cook for 5 minutes until crisp.
Split and toast brioche buns. Spread bun bases with mayonnaise, then top with lettuce, patties, bacon, pickles and remaining tomato sauce; sandwich together with bun tops.
Serve cheeseburgers with sweet potato chips.

recipes.title: Classic beef burger
recipes.description: Why order takeaway when you can enjoy these at home?

ingredients.name: chopped fresh flat-leaf parsley
ingredients.raw: ¼ cup chopped fresh flat-leaf parsley

ingredients.name: mayonnaise, lettuce, sliced tomato, sliced cheddar and pickles to serve
ingredients.raw: mayonnaise, lettuce, sliced tomato, sliced cheddar and pickles to serve

steps: Place bread and milk in a large bowl; stand 10 minutes.
Heat oil in a small frying pan over medium heat; cook onion and garlic, stirring, for 5 minutes or until softened.
Add onion mixture to bread mixture with remaining ingredients; season well. Combine ingredients well using your hands.
Shape into 4 patties. Refrigerate for 15 minutes.
Cook patties in a large oiled frying pan or barbecue plate over medium-high heat for 5 minutes each side or until cooked through.
Halve and toast 4 burger buns. Sandwich buns with mayonnaise, lettuce, sliced tomato, patties and sliced cheddar. Serve with pickles.

recipes.title: Haloumi schnitzel sandwiches
recipes.description: Satisfy hungry tummies with these tasty schnitzel sandwiches for vegetarians.

ingredients.name: extra virgin olive oil, plus 1
ingredients.raw: 1 tablespoon extra virgin olive oil, plus 1/3 cup (80ml) extra

ingredients.name: grams haloumi, sliced lengthways into 4 pieces
ingredients.raw: 250 grams haloumi, sliced lengthways into 4 pieces

ingredients.name: seeded wholegrain bread rolls, halved lengthways
ingredients.raw: 4 seeded wholegrain bread rolls, halved lengthways

steps: Heat the 1 tablespoon of oil in a large heavy-based saucepan over medium heat. Cook onion, stirring occasionally, for 5 minutes or until soft. Add garlic and ½ teaspoon of the paprika; cook, stirring, for a further 1 minute or until fragrant.
Stir in canned and grape tomatoes. Reduce heat to low; cook, covered, for 15 minutes or until sauce thickens. Season to taste.

Meanwhile, pat haloumi dry with paper towel. Combine breadcrumbs, the 2 tablespoons parsley and remaining paprika in a shallow bowl. Place egg and flour in separate shallow bowls. Dip each piece of haloumi in flour; shake off excess. Dip in egg; drain off excess. Evenly coat in breadcrumbs; pat to firmly stick on crumbs. Place crumbed haloumi on a tray lined with baking paper. Sprinkle over any remaining crumb mixture.
Recipe can be prepared a day ahead. Store haloumi on a covered tray in the fridge. Store tomato sauce in an airtight container in the fridge.

Heat extra oil in a large non-stick frying pan over medium heat to 180°C/350°F (or until a cube of bread turns golden in 30 seconds). Cook haloumi schnitzels for 2 minutes on each side or 
until golden and crisp; transfer to paper towel to drain.
Stir extra parsley through tomato sauce. Spread bottom halves of bread rolls with tomato sauce; top with schnitzels, eggplant, aïoli and rocket. Sandwich with bread top.

recipes.title: Falafel burgers
recipes.description: A flavourful vegetarian dinner for the whole family.

ingredients.name: gram canned chickpeas , rinsed, drained
ingredients.raw: 600 gram (1¼ pounds) canned chickpeas (garbanzo beans), rinsed, drained

ingredients.name: coarsely chopped
ingredients.raw: 1/2 cup fresh flat-leaf parsley, coarsely chopped

steps: Blend or process chickpeas, onion, garlic, parsley, spices, soda, flour and egg until almost smooth, season. Shape mixture into four patties, place on tray. Cover, refrigerate 1 hour.
Cook patties on heated oiled barbecue flat plate about 10 minutes or until browned both sides.
Cut bread into quarters, toast both sides on heated oiled barbecue (or grill or grill pan).
Meanwhile, make yogurt and tahini sauce. Combine ingredients in small bowl, season to taste.
Split each piece of bread in half horizontally; sandwich sauce, rocket, patties and tomato between bread halves.

recipes.title: Cauliflower fritter rolls with fried haloumi and lime emulsion
recipes.description: Meltingly soft haloumi and herby cauliflower fritters in a soft roll make for a magic meal.

ingredients.name: cauliflower fritter rolls with fried haloumi
ingredients.raw: Cauliflower fritter rolls with fried haloumi

ingredients.name: eggs, soft-boiled for 5 minutes, cooled and peeled
ingredients.raw: 2 eggs, soft-boiled for 5 minutes, cooled and peeled

ingredients.name: vegetable stock, plus extra if needed
ingredients.raw: 4 tablespoon vegetable stock, plus extra if needed

ingredients.name: each salt and white pepper
ingredients.raw: pinch each salt and white pepper

steps: In a bowl, mix the first seven ingredients together until well combined.
Heat oil in a large frying pan and fry spoonfuls of the cauliflower batter until golden.
Lightly coat haloumi with flour, then fry in same oil until golden.
Slice baguette horizontally (not all the way through). Smother base in lime emulsion, then layer fritters, coriander and avocado on top.
Cut in half and add a squeeze of lime juice before serving or serve with lime wedges.
Place eggs, all the zest, half the lime juice, and stock in a food processor. Blitz for about 30 seconds.
Very slowly drizzle in the oil until you have an emulsion. Add more lime juice and stock if required. Season to taste.

recipes.title: Beet and black bean burger
recipes.description: The ultimate vegetarian burgers with sweet potato curly fries.

ingredients.name: firmly packed chopped flat-leaf parsley leaves and stems
ingredients.raw: ¼ cup firmly packed chopped flat-leaf parsley leaves and stems

steps: Heat half the oil in a small frying pan over medium heat; cook onion, stirring, for 3 minutes or until softened. Add garlic; cook stirring, for 1 minute or until fragrant.
Process onion mixture, parsley, beetroot, black beans, breadcrumbs and flaxseed meal until the mixture comes together but still retains some texture. Shape mixture into four 9cm patties.

Meanwhile, make sweet potato fries. Cut sweet potatoes into long 5mm thick chips. Fill a large heavy-based saucepan one-third full with oil and heat to 180°C/350°F (or until a cube of bread browns in 15 seconds). Fry, in batches, for 2 minutes or until golden. Drain on a paper-towel-lined tray; season to taste with salt.

Heat remaining oil in a medium frying pan over medium heat. Cook patties for 3 minutes on each side or until golden and heated through. (Char patties slightly if you want a traditional char-grilled taste.)
Preheat grill to high. Place rolls, cut-side up, on an oven tray. Place under grill for 5 minutes or until golden.
Spread tomato sauce and mustard on base of rolls; top with patties, tomato, pickles and lettuce, then roll tops. Serve burgers with curly fries.

recipes.title: Cajun chicken burgers
recipes.description: Simple to prepare and really tasty too!
steps: Cut chicken in half horizontally; sprinkle all over with seasoning. Cook on heated oiled barbecue (or grill or grill pan).
Meanwhile, cut rolls in half; toast, cut-sides down, on barbecue.
Combine yogurt and rind in small bowl.
Combine tomato, shallot and avocado in small bowl; season.
Sandwich mesclun, avocado mixture, chicken and yogurt mixture between rolls.

recipes.title: Peach and pork burger with smoky nectarine relish
recipes.description: We've given the classic burger an extra fruity twist.

ingredients.name: aioli and thinly sliced lebanese cucumber, to serve
ingredients.raw: aioli and thinly sliced Lebanese cucumber, to serve

steps: To make the relish, combine nectarines, eschalot, tomato, sugar, vinegar and paprika in a small saucepan over medium heat. Bring to a simmer, stirring to dissolve the sugar. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 6 minutes, stirring occasionally or until reduced and thickened. Set aside to cool.

To make the pickled peaches, combine the mustard seeds, sugar, vinegar and salt together in a small saucepan over high heat. Bring to the boil. Place the peaches in a small heat proof bowl. Pour over the pickling liquid and allow to cool before refrigerating.
Combine mince, egg, breadcrumbs, eschalot, mustard, parmesan and spices in a medium bowl. Season and mix well to combine. Divide the mixture into 4 portions and shape into patties.
Heat chargrill or barbecue on high Cook the prosciutto slices until golden and crisp. Set aside. Place the bun halves, cut side down on the grill for 1 minute, or until golden and toasted.

Lower the heat to medium high. Lightly brush the patties with oil and cook for 3-4 minutes each side, or until charred and cooked through. Set aside to rest. To assemble, spread the aioli on the base of each bun. Top with lettuce, tomatoes, prosciutto, patty, pickled peaches, pickled red onion, cucumber and relish.

recipes.title: Quinoa zucchini haloumi burgers
recipes.description: Burgers don't have to be all about juicy meat patties!

ingredients.name: coarsely chopped fresh mint
ingredients.raw: ⅓ cup coarsely chopped fresh mint

ingredients.name: finely chopped fresh chives
ingredients.raw: ⅓ cup finely chopped fresh chives

ingredients.name: tomato kasundi or chutney
ingredients.raw: ⅓ cup (95g) tomato kasundi or chutney

ingredients.name: loosely packed fresh mint leaves, extra
ingredients.raw: ½ cup loosely packed fresh mint leaves, extra

steps: Place quinoa and the water in a small saucepan; bring to the boil. Reduce heat to low; simmer gently for 15 minutes or until most of the water is absorbed. Remove from heat; cover, stand for 5 minutes. Transfer to a large bowl; cool.

Add zucchini to quinoa with haloumi, chopped mint, chives, egg and ⅔ cup of the flour; season, then mix well. Shape mixture into six patties with damp hands. Place on a plate; refrigerate for 30 minutes.
Coat patties in remaining flour. Heat oil in a medium non-stick frying pan over medium heat; cook patties for 4 minutes each side or until golden brown.
Top base of rolls with kasundi, patties, beetroot, tomato, rocket and extra mint. Top with bread roll tops.

recipes.title: ‘shroom burger with onion rings
recipes.description: The ultimate vegie burger.

ingredients.name: char-grilled capsicum, chopped finely
ingredients.raw: ¼ cup (30g) char-grilled capsicum, chopped finely

ingredients.name: large ready-to-eat cooked beetroot , sliced
ingredients.raw: 1 large ready-to-eat cooked beetroot (150g), sliced (see tips)

steps: Combine mayonnaise and capsicum in a small bowl; season.

Make onion rings. Combine flour and almond meal in a medium bowl; make a well in the centre. Add egg and milk; whisk to combine. Season. Coat onion rings in extra flour in a medium bowl. Fill a large saucepan one-third full with oil; heat to 180°C (or until a cube of bread turns golden in 15 seconds). Dip onion rings into batter. Deep-fry, in batches, for 30 seconds each side or until browned lightly and crisp. Drain on paper towel.

Place mushrooms and 2 tablespoons of the oil in a medium bowl; toss to coat. Cook mushrooms on a heated grill plate (or grill or barbecue) over medium heat for 3 minutes each side or until just tender. Transfer to a heatproof plate; cover to keep warm.
Brush haloumi with remaining oil. Cook on heated grill plate for 1 minute each side or until browned.

Place 4 mushrooms, stem-side up, onto plates. Top with watercress, haloumi, beetroot, tomato and mayonnaise mixture. Top with remaining mushrooms, stem-side down. Secure with a skewer. Serve with onion rings.

recipes.title: Our best-ever chicken burger
recipes.description: BEST. EVER!
steps: Combine chicken and buttermilk in a large shallow dish. Refrigerate for 30 minutes.
Combine the flour, paprika, onion salt, celery salt, pepper and sugar in a plastic bag.

Remove the chicken from the buttermilk. Add the drained chicken pieces, one at a time, to the spice mixture. Shake to coat in the spice mixture, then gently shake away any excess (you don't want to remove too much).

Add oil to a large deep frying pan to one-third full; heat to 180°C. Cook chicken, in batches, for about 5 minutes, turning regularly, or until cooked through. Remove from the pan and transfer to a wire rack or paper towel.
Meanwhile, cook bacon under an oven grill until crisp; remove to wire rack or paper towel.
Top buns with chicken, bacon, mayonnaise, sliced tomatoes and rocket. Not suitable to freeze or microwave.

recipes.title: Pulled pork sliders with apple slaw and chipotle mayo
recipes.description: Sweet slaw and smoky mayo give these burgers a gorgeous edge.

ingredients.name: chipotle chillies in adobo sauce , chopped finely
ingredients.raw: 2 chipotle chillies in adobo sauce (see tips), chopped finely

ingredients.name: adobo sauce from canned chipotle chillies in adobo sauce
ingredients.raw: 2 tablespoons adobo sauce from canned chipotle chillies in adobo sauce

ingredients.name: mini wholemeal mixed seed bread rolls
ingredients.raw: 12 mini wholemeal mixed seed bread rolls (580g)

ingredients.name: small red delicious apples , unpeeled, cut into matchsticks, reserve cores
ingredients.raw: 2 small red delicious apples (260g), unpeeled, cut into matchsticks, reserve cores

ingredients.name: small fennel bulb , cut into matchsticks, reserve stems and fronds
ingredients.raw: 1 small fennel bulb (200g), cut into matchsticks, reserve stems and fronds

ingredients.name: small shallots , peeled , sliced thinly
ingredients.raw: 2 small shallots (50g), peeled (skins reserved), sliced thinly

ingredients.name: fresh coriander , stems reserved, leaves chopped
ingredients.raw: 1 bunch fresh coriander (100g), stems reserved, leaves chopped

ingredients.name: chipotle chilli in adobo sauce , chopped finely
ingredients.raw: 1 chipotle chilli in adobo sauce (see tips), chopped finely

ingredients.name: adobo sauce from canned chipotle chillies in adobo sauce
ingredients.raw: 2 tablespoons adobo sauce from canned chipotle chillies in adobo sauce

steps: Make apple slaw. Place ingredients, including reserved fennel fronds, in a medium bowl; toss gently to combine. Season to taste. Refrigerate until required.
Preheat oven to 150°C.
Cut pork in half lengthways; pat dry with paper towel. Combine chopped chipotle, adobo sauce, paprika, cumin and ground coriander in a large bowl; add pork, turn to coat. Season.

Heat oil in a large 4 litre (16 cup) flameproof baking dish over high heat. Cook pork for 2 minutes each side or until browned. Remove from dish. Wipe dish clean, add any leftover marinade to dish, with thyme, oregano, beer, stock, garlic, cinnamon and reserved off-cuts (from the apple slaw). Bring to the boil; cover, then transfer to oven. Bake pork for 2 hours or until tender.

Meanwhile, make chipotle mayo. Blend or process egg and mustard until combined. With the motor operating, add oil, drop by drop at first, then in a thin, steady stream, until mixture thickens. Stir in vinegar, chopped chipotle and adobo sauce. Season to taste.

Remove pork from dish. Using two forks, shred meat; place in a medium bowl. Transfer braising liquid to a large deep frying pan. Bring to the boil; boil for 15 minutes or until reduced to 1 cup (250ml). Stir lime juice into reduced liquid; pour over pork, toss to coat.
Split rolls in half; divide slaw, pork and mayo among rolls.

recipes.title: Thermomix chipotle maple pulled pork burgers
recipes.description: A classic American favourite.

ingredients.name: chipotle in adobo sauce
ingredients.raw: ½ cup (105g) chipotle in adobo sauce

ingredients.name: grams pork scotch fillet, cut into 5cm pieces
ingredients.raw: 750 grams pork scotch fillet, cut into 5cm (2in) pieces

ingredients.name: medium red cabbage , chopped into 4cm chunks
ingredients.raw: ¼ medium red cabbage (225g), chopped into 4cm chunks

steps: Place cumin in mixing bowl; cook for 2 min/steam mode/speed 2 or until fragrant and lightly toasted. Mill for 10 sec/speed 9. Add tomatoes, chipotle in adobo sauce, orange juice and maple syrup; blend for 10 sec/speed 6 or until smooth.

Season pork. Heat oil in a large frying pan over high heat; cook pork, in batches, for 2 minutes each side until browned. Transfer to a plate. Add ⅓ cup (80ml) water to frying pan; cook for 2 minutes, stirring and scraping with a wooden spoon, until reduced by half. Add to mixing bowl along with pork and onion; cook for 80 min/100°C/reverse/stir mode or until pork is very tender and can be pulled apart with a fork.

Use tongs to remove pork to a large bowl. Use two forks to gently shred meat. Cook sauce for 15 min/steam mode/speed 3, with simmering basket in place of measuring cup, until reduced by half. Return pork to mixing bowl; cook for 1 min/steam mode/reverse/stir mode to heat through. Transfer to a bowl and cover to keep warm.

Make buttermilk apple slaw. Clean mixing bowl. Place buttermilk, mayonnaise, vinegar and mustard in mixing bowl; blend for 20 sec/speed 6. Season to taste. Add green onion; chop for 3 sec/speed 4. Add cabbage and apples; chop for 3 sec/speed 4. Scrape down the side of bowl. Chop for 2 sec/speed 4 or until coarsely chopped.
Top bread roll bases with watercress and slaw, spoon over pork mixture, then top with bread roll tops

recipes.title: Mega mushroom burgers
recipes.description: The ultimate low-carb hack.

ingredients.raw: 1/2 cup (125ml) Bertolli Extra Virgin Olive Oil Robusto

ingredients.name: grams eggplant, cut into 4 slices crossways
ingredients.raw: 300 grams (medium) eggplant, cut into 4 slices crossways

ingredients.name: grams goat's fetta, cut into 4 slices crossways
ingredients.raw: 200 grams (6½oz) goat's fetta, cut into 4 slices crossways
1/2 cup firmly packed fresh basil leaves
1/2 cup (125ml) Bertolli Extra Virgin Olive Oil Robusto

steps: Preheat oven to 200°C/400°F. Line three oven trays with baking paper.

Place mushrooms cup-side up, on two trays. Drizzle with 2 tablespoons of the oil; season. Place eggplant on remaining tray. Drizzle with ¼ cup of the remaining oil. Roast mushrooms and eggplant for 35 minutes.
Meanwhile, make rocket and walnut pesto.
Place fetta slices on an oven tray. Place under hot grill (broiler) for 5 minutes or until browned lightly.
Toss tomatoes in remaining oil and the vinegar in a medium bowl.

Place four mushrooms, cup-side up, on plates. Top with fetta, eggplant, tomato, avocado, spinach, pesto and remaining mushrooms, cup-side down. Season. Top burger with 
sesame seeds, if you like.

Blend or process rocket, basil, walnuts, garlic and parmesan  until combined. Add oil in a thin steady stream, blend until smooth. Add juice; blend until just combined. If pesto is too thick, add 1 tablespoon water. Season. (Makes 1 cup)

recipes.title: Cheeseburger rolls in sausage roll maker
recipes.description: A quick and easy dinner idea.

ingredients.name: american mustard, plus extra to serve
ingredients.raw: 2 tablespoons American mustard, plus extra to serve

ingredients.name: tomato sauce, plus extra to serve
ingredients.raw: 1 tablespoon tomato sauce, plus extra to serve

ingredients.name: plus extra to serve
ingredients.raw: 1/3 cup (60g) sliced bread and butter pickles, plus extra to serve

steps: Trim brioche buns to fit into sausage roll maker holes. Split buns horizontally, without cutting all the way through. Spread each bun base with 2 teaspoons mustard. Fold beef slices into quarters; place 2 quarters on the base of each bun. Top each with 1 teaspoon of tomato sauce, 2 cheese halves and 3 pickles. Sandwich with bun lids.
Spray a 4-hole (2-tablespoon) sausage roll maker with oil.
Place cheeseburger rolls in holes; spray with oil and sprinkle with sesame seeds. Turn machine on. Close lid without locking; cook for 5 minutes or until buns are toasted and cheese has melted.
Serve cheeseburger rolls with extra mustard, tomato sauce, pickles and potato crisps.

recipes.title: Make chicken schnitty rolls in your sausage roll maker
recipes.description: Tasty lunch in no time.

ingredients.name: hamburger helper seasoning mix
ingredients.raw: ¼ cup (25g) hamburger helper seasoning mix (see cook's notes)

steps: Place flour in a shallow bowl. Whisk eggs in another shallow bowl. Combine breadcrumbs, hamburger helper and parsley in a third shallow bowl.
Lightly dust chicken in flour, shake off excess. Working with one at a time, dip floured chicken in egg, then coat in breadcrumb mixture.
Spray a 4-hole (2-tablespoon) sausage roll maker with oil; turn machine on.

Place four schnitzels in holes; spray with oil. Close lid; cook for 5 minutes. Carefully turn schnitzels over. Close lid; cook for a further 4 minutes or until golden and cooked through. Transfer to a tray; cover to keep warm. Turn machine off for 5 minutes to cool slightly. Repeat with remaining schnitzels.
Meanwhile, combine coleslaw mix and mayonnaise in a bowl.
Split rolls lengthways along the top, without cutting all the way through. Cut schnitzels in half lengthways; place 2 halves in rolls, then top with coleslaw.

recipes.title: Vegie burgers two ways
recipes.description: Mix and match or have one of each.

ingredients.name: small head broccoli , chopped coarsely
ingredients.raw: ½ small head broccoli (125g), chopped coarsely

steps: Preheat oven to 200°C. Line a large oven tray with baking paper.
Process chickpeas, onion, almond meal, egg, harissa, cumin and baking powder to form a chunky paste; season. Transfer half the mixture to another bowl.

To make beetroot patties, use your hand to squeeze any excess liquid from beetroot; add flesh to processor. Pulse to combine. Divide beetroot mixture in half; shape into two patties. Place on a tray lined with baking paper.

To make broccoli patties, process broccoli and spinach until chopped finely; add to reserved chickpea mixture. Divide broccoli mixture in half; shape into 2 patties. Place on tray alongside beetroot patties; spray with olive oil. Bake patties for 25 minutes or until firm and lightly browned.
Make rocket aïoli. Process ingredients in a small food processor until smooth and well combined. Transfer to a small bowl; season to taste.

Heat a non-stick frying pan over medium heat; add buns, cut-side down. Toast for 2 minutes or until light golden. Transfer buns to plates. Spread cut sides of buns with aïoli. Place a pattie on each bun base.
Top patties with slaw and a spoonful of rocket aïoli. Cover patties with bun lids; serve.

recipes.title: Ginger beer pulled pork rolls
recipes.description: Give it a zing.
steps: Preheat oven to 160°C (140°C fan-forced). Remove rind from pork; reserve. Season pork. Peel and quarter brown onions.

Heat oil in a large flameproof casserole dish over high heat; cook pork and onions, turning, for 5 minutes or until pork is browned on both sides. Add ginger beer and vinegar to dish; bring to the boil. Cover with a tight-fitting lid.
Roast pork in oven for 3 hours, turning pork once. Remove lid; roast for a further 30 minutes or until pork pulls apart easily. Remove pork from dish; cover with foil.
Place dish with roasted onion and pan juices on the stove to high heat; bring to the boil. Cook for 10 minutes or until reduced and thickened. Using two forks, shred the pork; stir through the sauce.
Assemble coleslaw following packet instructions. Split bread rolls. Fill rolls with coleslaw and pulled pork.

recipes.title: Thai fish burger
recipes.description: Not your average burger, this version is made with Thai flavours and a fish patty for a lighter burger

ingredients.name: gram blue eye fillets, chopped coarsely
ingredients.raw: 500 gram blue eye fillets, chopped coarsely

ingredients.name: fresh small red thai chilli, chopped coarsely
ingredients.raw: 1 fresh small red thai chilli, chopped coarsely

ingredients.name: gram green beans, trimmed, chopped coarsely
ingredients.raw: 50 gram green beans, trimmed, chopped coarsely

steps: Blend or process fish, sauce, kecap manis, garlic and chilli until smooth. Combine fish mixture in large bowl with beans, shallots and coriander; shape into four patties.
Cook patties on heated oiled flat plate about 15 minutes or until cooked. Transfer to a heatproof plate and keep warm.
Combine spinach, cucumber, juice, sugar and extra sauce in medium bowl.
Split buns in half; toast cut sides. Sandwich salad, patties and sweet chilli sauce between bun halves.

recipes.title: Thai fish burgers with pickled vegetables
recipes.description: These delicious Thai fish burgers with pickled vegetables are loaded with fresh flavours and textures, you simply can't resist.

ingredients.name: fresh long red chillies, sliced thinly
ingredients.raw: 2 fresh long red chillies, sliced thinly

ingredients.name: fresh kaffir lime leaves, sliced thinly
ingredients.raw: 4 fresh kaffir lime leaves, sliced thinly

steps: Using a mandoline, V-slicer or wide vegetable peeler, thinly slice cucumber and carrot lengthways into long ribbons. Combine cucumber, carrot, chilli, sugar and vinegar in a medium bowl. Stand for 10 minutes or until vegetables have softened, turning every few minutes. Drain.
Meanwhile, pulse fish, paste, fish sauce, lime leaves, beans, egg and half the coriander in a food processor for 1 minute or until smooth. Using oiled hands, shape mixture into four 12cm patties.
Heat oil in a large frying pan over medium heat. Cook patties for 2 minutes each side or until cooked through. Drain on paper towel.
Add bread rolls, cut-side down, to same frying pan; cook for 1 minute or until lightly toasted.
Sandwich rolls with fish burgers, sweet chilli sauce, pickled vegetables and remaining coriander.

recipes.title: Beetroot relish and yoghurt lamb burgers
recipes.description: These gently spiced burgers really hit the spot.
steps: Make beetroot relish. Cook beetroot, onion and the water in large frying pan, covered, 15 minutes or until beetroot is tender. Stir in sugar and vinegar; cook, covered, stirring occasionally, 20 minutes. Uncover; cook, stirring occasionally, 10 minutes or until liquid evaporates.
Meanwhile, combine lamb, onion, garlic, cumin and egg in medium bowl; season to taste. Shape mixture into four patties.
Cook patties on heated oiled barbecue (or grill or grill pan). Remove from barbecue; cover to keep warm.
Combine yoghurt, extra cumin and mint in small bowl.
Cut bread into quarters; halve quarters horizontally. Toast bread on heated oiled barbecue, until browned both sides.
Sandwich rocket, patties, yoghurt mixture and relish between bread.

recipes.title: Cauliflower burgers
recipes.description: A delicious and low-carb burger.

ingredients.name: canned cannellini beans, drained, rinsed
ingredients.raw: ½ cup (100g) canned cannellini beans, drained, rinsed

steps: Place beetroot, onion, salt, vinegar, sugar and thyme in medium saucepan; bring to the boil. Reduce heat; simmer, uncovered, stirring occasionally, for 20 minutes or until beetroot is tender and slightly sticky. Cool.
Meanwhile, boil, steam or microwave cauliflower until tender. Drain; cool. Thinly slice 90g (3 ounces) of the cheddar; grate remaining cheddar.

Place cauliflower and beans in a food processor, pulse until coarsely chopped (do not over process). Transfer 
to a large bowl. Add ¼ cup (15g) of the breadcrumbs, the grated cheddar, parsley, rind and nuts; season, stir to combine. Shape cauliflower mixture into four patties. Refrigerate for 30 minutes.
Make lemon mayonnaise. Whisk ingredients in a small bowl until combined; season to taste.
Dip patties in egg white; coat patties in remaining breadcrumbs.
Heat oil in a large frying pan over medium-high heat; cook patties for 4 minutes each side or until browned and crisp. Drain on paper towel. Immediately top with sliced cheese for cheese to melt.

Place each patty in a lettuce leaf; top with tomato and a generous spoonful of the beetroot mixture (you will only use half the mixture, see tips). Drizzle with lemon mayonnaise; top with remaining lettuce leaf.

recipes.title: Mediterranean lamb burgers
recipes.description: It's burger time, Mediterranean-style.

ingredients.name: wholemeal bread rolls split in half
ingredients.raw: 2 wholemeal bread rolls (140g) split in half

ingredients.name: finely chopped fresh mint leaves
ingredients.raw: 1 tablespoon finely chopped fresh mint leaves

steps: Process lamb, egg white, breadcrumbs, herbs,rind, garlic and paste until smooth. Using wet hands, shape mixture into two patties.
Light spray heated large non-stick pan; cook patties, over medium heat, until browned both sides and cooked through.
Make yogurt sauce by combine yoghurt, garlic, mint and cucumber in small bowl.
Sandwich salad leaves, tomato, patties, onion and yogurt sauce between rolls.

recipes.title: The best-ever beef burger
recipes.description: Everyone has their own version of a homemade beef burger, but this one is one of our favourites. It's served on a sweet and fluffy brioche bun with pickles and chilli jam.

ingredients.name: gram beef chuck steak, chopped coarsely
ingredients.raw: 500 gram beef chuck steak, chopped coarsely
1/3 cup (90g) chilli jam or tomato relish

steps: Heat butter in a large frying pan over medium heat. Add onions, cook, stirring, until golden and caramelised (about 15 minutes). Cool.
Meanwhile, pulse the beef in a food processor, in two batches, until coarsely minced (or the coarse plate of a mincer, if you have one).
Combine the beef, onions, egg, breadcrumbs and Worcestershire sauce in a large bowl. Season with salt and freshly ground black pepper; mix well. Form mixture into four patties.
Heat oil in a large frying pan over medium-high heat; cook patties, turning once, until just cooked through. Top patties with cheese during the last minute of cooking and allow the cheese to melt.
Toast the cut sides of the buns. Divide lettuce, patties, relish, pickles and tomato among bun bases; sandwich with bun tops.

recipes.title: Fish schnitzel butties with polenta chips
recipes.description: A fresh take on the classic fish burger. Served with polenta chips and zucchini tzatziki to make it that little bit special.

ingredients.name: x200g skinless blue-eye trevalla fillets, trimmed
ingredients.raw: 4 x200g skinless blue-eye trevalla fillets, trimmed

ingredients.name: extra virgin olive oil
ingredients.raw: ¼ cup (60ml) extra virgin olive oil

ingredients.name: finely chopped fresh mint
ingredients.raw: ¼ cup finely chopped fresh mint

steps: Prepare polenta chips.

Meanwhile, place flour, egg and breadcrumbs in separate shallow bowls. Add one piece of fish to flour; shake away excess. Dip in egg, then pat in breadcrumbs, pressing to coat well. Transfer to a plate. Repeat with remaining fish, flour, egg and breadcrumbs. Cover; refrigerate until needed.
Make zucchini tzatziki.
Combine kale slaw, lemon juice and oil in a bowl; season to taste. Refrigerate until required.
Preheat oven to 150°C.
Transfer polenta mixture to a chopping board; cut into thick fingers. Dust with reserved polenta from polenta chips.

Heat vegetable oil in a large deep frying pan over medium-high heat. Cook chips, in batches, turning, for 4 minutes or until golden. Transfer to a tray lined with paper towel to drain. Keep polenta chips warm in preheated oven while cooking fish.
Cook two pieces of fish at a time in same frying pan for 4 minutes; turn and cook for a further 3 minutes or until golden and cooked through. Drain on paper towel.
Top the base of each roll with slaw; place fish on top, then tzatziki and roll top. Serve with polenta chips and lemon wedges.

Grease and line a 20cm (8in) square cake pan with baking paper. Place milk in a heavy-based saucepan, then season with salt and pepper; bring just to the boil over medium heat. Gradually add ¾ cup of the polenta in a thin stream, stirring constantly with a wooden spoon; reserve remaining polenta for dusting. Cook, stirring, for 2 minutes or until polenta is thick and comes away from sides of pan. Stir in pecorino and lemon thyme. Pour mixture into prepared pan; smooth surface. Cover; refrigerate for 2 hours or until chilled and set.
Using your hands, squeeze out excess liquid from zucchini; transfer to a bowl. Add remaining ingredients; stir to mix well. Season to taste. Makes about 2 cups.

recipes.title: Grilled cajun fish burgers with hot coriander sauce
recipes.description: Change things up with some cajun fish on your burger night!

ingredients.name: x 150g firm white fish fillets, skinned, boned
ingredients.raw: 8 x 150g firm white fish fillets, skinned, boned

ingredients.name: medium white bread rolls , split in half
ingredients.raw: 4 medium white bread rolls (200g), split in half

steps: Make hot coriander sauce: Blend or process ingredients until combined. Season to taste.
Combine spice mix, fish and oil in a shallow dish; season.

Preheat a char-grill plate (or grill or barbecue) to high. Cook fish for 2 minutes each side or until just cooked through. Toast bread rolls, in batches, cut-side down on grill for 1 minute each side or until grill marks are visible
Meanwhile, combine mayonnaise, cabbage, liquid smoke, and coriander in a large bowl; season to taste.
To assemble burgers, divide half the fish between bread bases, top with cabbage mixture, remaining fish, jalapeño then drizzle with hot coriander sauce.

recipes.title: Healthy kumara and turkey burgers
recipes.description: This delicious recipe from The Australian Women's Weekly's 'The Sustainable Cookbook' proves that healthy eating can be tasty. This recipe uses sliced kumara as an alternative to buns, and free-range mince.

ingredients.name: large kumara , unpeeled
ingredients.raw: 1 large kumara (orange sweet potato) (500g), unpeeled (see tip)

ingredients.name: gram minced free-range turkey or chicken
ingredients.raw: 400 gram minced (ground) free-range turkey or chicken

ingredients.name: finely chopped fresh flat-leaf parsley
ingredients.raw: 1 tablespoon finely chopped fresh flat-leaf parsley

ingredients.name: small red onion , extra, sliced thinly
ingredients.raw: 1 small red onion (100g), extra, sliced thinly

steps: Preheat oven to 200°C. Oil and line two large oven trays with baking paper.
Cut kumara into twelve 1.5cm-thick rounds. Place kumara slices, in a single layer, on trays; spray with cooking oil. Roast 20 minutes or until tender. Cover to keep warm.
Meanwhile, make green tahini: Process all ingredients until smooth; season to taste.
Combine quinoa flakes and milk in a small bowl; stand for 10 minutes.
Combine turkey, zucchini, carrot, onion, parsley and quinoa mixture in a medium bowl; season. Using damp hands, shape turkey mixture into six 8cm patties. Cover; refrigerate 30 minutes.
Heat oil in a large non-stick frying pan over medium heat; cook patties for 4 minutes on each side or until golden and cooked through.
Place patties on six kumara rounds; top with tomato, green tahini, watercress, extra onion and remaining kumara rounds. Top with sesame seeds.

recipes.title: Greek-style pork steak sandwiches
recipes.description: Everyone loves a steak sandwich but our take on this traditional pub meal using pork, will have everyone coming back for more.

ingredients.name: dried rigani or dried oregano
ingredients.raw: 2 teaspoons dried rigani or dried oregano (see Test Kitchen tips)

steps: Pound pork using a meat mallet. Finely grate the rind from the lemon; squeeze juice. Combine pork, rind, half the juice, rigani, paprika, oil, salt and garlic in a medium bowl; toss well. Cover, refrigerate for up to 1 hour.

Meanwhile, halve cucumber lengthways; remove seeds. Grate cucumber coarsely; squeeze out excess liquid. Combine cucumber, mayonnaise, yogurt, mint, garlic and reserved lemon juice in a small bowl; mix well. Season to taste.

Cook pork on heated barbecue or grill pan over medium-high heat for 3 minutes each side or until browned and tender. Transfer to a plate; cover to keep warm. Heat buns on barbecue or grill pan for about 30 seconds each side or until just warmed.
To assemble burgers, place lettuce on the bottom half of each bun, top with pork, Tzatziki Mayonnaise and onion. Sprinkle with black pepper and fresh oregano or mint, if desired.

recipes.title: The green turkey burger
recipes.description: Take this delicious lettuce wrapped burger to the next step and veg it up! Replace turkey patties with pan-fried haloumi or fried flat mushrooms.

ingredients.name: gram minced free-range turkey or chicken
ingredients.raw: 400 gram minced (ground) free-range turkey or chicken

ingredients.name: finely chopped fresh flat-leaf parsley
ingredients.raw: 1 tablespoon finely chopped fresh flat-leaf parsley

ingredients.name: large_piece iceberg lettuce leaves, cut into 10cm rounds
ingredients.raw: 12 large_piece iceberg lettuce leaves, cut into 10cm rounds

ingredients.name: small red onion , extra, sliced thinly
ingredients.raw: 1 small red onion (100g), extra, sliced thinly

steps: To make green tahini; process ingredients until smooth; season to taste.
Combine quinoa flakes and milk in a small bowl; stand for 10 minutes.
Combine zucchini, carrot, onion, turkey, parsley and quinoa mixture in a medium bowl; season to taste using damp hands, shape turkey mixture into six 8cm patties; cover, refrigerate for 30 minutes.
Heat half the oil in a large non-stick frying pan over low heat; cook kumara, turning, for 8 minutes or until tender.
Heat remaining oil over medium heat; cook patties, for 4 minutes each side or until golden and cooked through.
Top six lettuce rounds with patties, tomato, extra onion and kumara. drizzle with green tahini; top with remaining lettuce rounds. Serve immediately.

recipes.title: Crisp tofu banh mi
recipes.description: This delicious vegan sandwich from The Australian Women's Weekly' 'Vegan Kitchen' cookbook is packed with crisp tofu, pickled vegetables and a chilli vegan mayo for the perfect lunch idea.

ingredients.name: small lebanese cucumber , halved, seeded, cut into batons
ingredients.raw: 1 small lebanese cucumber (100g), halved, seeded, cut into batons
1/3 cup loosely packed fresh coriander (cilantro) leaves

ingredients.name: fresh long green chilli, sliced thinly
ingredients.raw: 1 fresh long green chilli, sliced thinly

ingredients.name: gram firm tofu, cut into 8 long slices
ingredients.raw: 300 gram (9½ ounces) firm tofu, cut into 8 long slices

ingredients.name: long wholegrain sourdough bread rolls , split
ingredients.raw: 4 long wholegrain sourdough bread rolls (200g), split (see tips)

ingredients.name: extra
ingredients.raw: 1/2 cup loosely packed fresh coriander (cilantro) leaves, extra
1/2 cup loosely packed fresh mint leaves

steps: Place carrot, cucumber and radish in a medium bowl. Pour vinegar over vegetables; sprinkle with coconut sugar and salt. Stir to combine.
Blend or process mayo, coriander and half the fresh chilli until smooth.
Place cornflour on a plate. Toss tofu in cornflour to coat. Heat oil in a large frying pan over medium-high heat. Cook tofu, turning, until golden and heated through.
Drain vegetables; reserve pickling liquid for another use (see tips).
Divide cabbage, pickled vegetables, tofu, mayo mixture, chilli sauce, extra coriander, mint and remaining fresh chilli between bread rolls.

recipes.title: Crumbed fish burgers with cabbage slaw and chilli mayo
recipes.description: Impress your family with these delicious homemade fish burgers, complete with a crunchy panko coating and rich and creamy cabbage slaw and mayonnaise sauce.

ingredients.name: gram skinless firm white fish fillets, sliced into 8 portions
ingredients.raw: 500 gram skinless firm white fish fillets, sliced into 8 portions

ingredients.name: long red chilli, seeded, finely chopped
ingredients.raw: 1 long red chilli, seeded, finely chopped

steps: Coat fish in flour, shaking off excess. Dip in egg and coat press into breadcrumbs to coat. Place on a tray and chill until required.
Meanwhile, in a large bowl combine cabbage, carrot and green onion.
In a small bowl, whisk mayonnaise and lemon juice until smooth. Stir dill and chilli through. Season.
In a large frying pan heat oil on high until a few crumbs when added. Fry fish 2 minutes each side until golden and just cooked through. Drain on paper towel.
Fill rolls with slaw and fish pieces. Top with mayo and serve with fries.

recipes.title: Crumbed fish burger
recipes.description: Crispy fish fillets go perfectly when sandwiched between two pieces of fluffy baguette with creamy mayo and fresh lettuce. Lunch is sorted.

ingredients.name: gram boneless, firm white fish fillets, cut into 12 pieces
ingredients.raw: 550 gram boneless, firm white fish fillets, cut into 12 pieces

ingredients.name: plus extra, to serve
ingredients.raw: 1/3 cup chopped dill, plus extra, to serve

steps: Preheat oven to 220°C (200°C fan-forced). Line a large oven tray with baking paper.

Toss fish in flour; shake away excess. Coat fish in egg whites, then in combined breadcrumbs, cornflake crumbs, salt and lemon pepper. Place fish in a single layer on the prepared tray; bake for 15 minutes or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, combine the mayonnaise and dill in a small bowl.
Cut each baguette in half, then slice in half lengthways, not cutting all the way through. Divide the fish, mayonnaise, extra dill and lettuce leaves among baguettes. Serve with a squeeze of lemon.

recipes.title: Thai prawn burgers
recipes.description: Love burgers and love seafood? These Thai style prawn burgers are the perfect fusion. And they're suitable for diabetics, too.

ingredients.name: fresh long red chillies, sliced thinly
ingredients.raw: 2 fresh long red chillies, sliced thinly

ingredients.name: uncooked, peeled small king prawns , chopped finely
ingredients.raw: 8 uncooked, peeled small king prawns (shrimp) (100g), chopped finely

ingredients.name: small piece wholemeal bread rolls , split in half crossways
ingredients.raw: 2 small piece wholemeal bread rolls (85g), split in half crossways

ingredients.name: sliced thinly
ingredients.raw: 1/2 small piece red onion (40g), sliced thinly

steps: Combine garlic, coriander root and stems, ginger, makrut lime leaves and half the chilli in a mortar and pestle, pound until mixture forms a thick paste. Divide paste in half.
Combine half of the paste with prawns and potato in a small bowl; using wet hands form mixture into two patties. Cover, refrigerate 2 hours or overnight.
Add half the oil and 2 teaspoons of juice to the remaining paste in a small bowl. Cover, refrigerate until required.
Heat remaining oil in a small non-stick frying pan over low heat; cook patties for 3 minutes each side or until cooked through. Transfer to a plate; drizzle patties with remaining juice.
Place bread rolls, cut-side down, in same pan for 1 minute or until warm.
