Toss lettuce, onion, sprouts, cucumber, coriander leaves and remaining chilli through reserved paste. Sandwich salad and patties between rolls.

recipes.title: Beetroot and lentil burgers
recipes.description: Everyone loves a good burger, and everyone will love these beetroot and lentil burgers! Healthy, wholesome and mouthwatering-delicious!
steps: Using paper towel, squeeze excess liquid from beetroot. Set aside in a bowl.
In a food processor, pulse lentils until pulpy. Transfer the bowl with beetroot. Stir in feta, onion, mint leaves, sumac, eggs and breadcrumbs. Mix well. Season to taste.
Shape beetroot mixture into 4 even-sized, flattened patties. Chill 15 minutes.
In a large frying pan heat oil on medium.  Cook patties 4-5 minutes each side until golden.  Drain on paper towel.
Spread the harissa mayonnaise on one side of each roll.  Top with patties, tomato, onion and lettuce.  Serve with kumara chips (see tip).

recipes.title: South Carolina pulled pork bun with mustard barbecue sauce
recipes.description: Tender, succulent pork is shredded and combined with a zingy mustard barbecue sauce to create these delicious  South Carolina pulled pork buns. These are a crowd favourite that will please all age groups - great for weekend drinks with friends.

ingredients.name: south carolina pulled pork buns with mustard barbecue sauce
ingredients.raw: South carolina pulled pork buns with mustard barbecue sauce

ingredients.name: large beetroot , peeled, cut into matchsticks
ingredients.raw: 1 large beetroot (200g), peeled, cut into matchsticks

steps: Preheat oven to 150°C.

Heat oil in a large, heavy-based casserole dish over high heat. Rub pork with garlic powder; season. Cook pork, in two batches if in two pieces, 2 minutes each side or until browned. Add stock; bring to the boil. Cover; cook in oven for 4 hours or until meat is very tender.

Meanwhile, make mustard barbecue sauce. Heat oil in a small saucepan over medium heat; cook onion, garlic and chilli powder for 5 minutes or until softened. Stir in mustard, sauces, the water and sugar; cook, stirring, for 10 minutes or until thickened slightly. Season.
Using two forks, shred pork into the cooking liquid. Discard any fatty pieces. Add 1½ cups of the mustard barbecue sauce to the shredded pork.
Combine cabbage, beetroot, currants, mayonnaise, vinegar and the water in a large bowl. Season to taste.
Fill brioche buns with pork and cabbage salad. Serve with remaining mustard barbecue sauce.

recipes.title: Mushroom sliders with pickled fennel and harissa creme fraiche
recipes.description: These vegetarian sliders and packed full of juicy roasted portobello mushrooms, zesty pickled fennel and a creamy harissa sauce. They make the ultimate finger food for entertaining and are easy to prepare.

ingredients.raw: 1/2 cup loosely packed fresh flat-leaf parsley leaves

ingredients.name: aby fennel bulb , trimmed, sliced thinly
ingredients.raw: 1 aby fennel bulb (120g), trimmed, sliced thinly

steps: Make pickled fennel: Combine ingredients in a medium bowl; stand 30 minutes. Before serving, drain fennel mixture; discard liquid.

Divide oil between two large non-stick frying pans, heat over medium heat. Divide mushrooms between pans; cook, covered, for 5 minutes each side or until golden and tender. For the last 2 minutes of cooking time, top mushrooms with cheddar until melted.
Meanwhile, make harissa creme fraiche: Combine ingredients in a small bowl. Season to taste.
Spread harissa creme fraiche on roll halves. Sandwich with mushrooms, pickled fennel, rocket and parsley.

recipes.title: Aussie burger with the lot
recipes.description: A quick beef burger to barbecue for the whole family, with the Aussie touches of pineapple and beetroot.
steps: In a medium bowl, mix beef, breadcrumbs, onion, garlic, parsley and egg. Season to taste. Shape mixture into 4 evenly sized patties. Place on a tray, cover and chill 15 minutes until firm.
Preheat an oiled barbecue plate on medium. Cook patties  3-5 minutes on each side, or until cooked through.
Spread one side of each roll with sauce. Top with lettuce, a patty, cheese, beetroot, pineapple, tomato, egg and onion. Top with remaining half of roll.

recipes.title: Lebanese lamb burgers
recipes.description: Add some spice to your classic burger with these lamb mince patties, filled with chilli-paste, garlic, and topped off with some Greek-style yoghurt.

ingredients.name: salt, freshly ground black pepper, to taste
ingredients.raw: salt, freshly ground black pepper, to taste

ingredients.name: lebanese cucumber, cut into thin ribbons
ingredients.raw: 1 lebanese cucumber, cut into thin ribbons

steps: Heat a large non-stick frying pan over medium-high heat. Sprinkle in cumin seeds; toast until golden. Remove; crush in a mortar and pestle or process in a mini food processor.
Place pine nuts in same pan; toast until golden.
Place cumin and pine nuts in a large bowl with lamb mince, onion, garlic, egg and rice; season with salt and pepper.
Using clean, damp hands, mix thoroughly until well combined and sticky. Divide mixture into six; shape into patties to fit turkish bread rolls.
Heat oil in same frying pan over medium-high heat; cook patties 6-7 minutes each side, or until golden brown and cooked through. Set aside to rest a few minutes.
Combine yogurt and harissa. Toast inside of rolls under a hot grill.
To assemble burgers, place a leaf of lettuce on each base, top with a lamb patty, sliced tomato, cucumber and a dollop of harissa yoghurt. Top with other half of roll.

recipes.title: Bacon and egg burger
steps: Heat a non-stick frying pan on high and spray with cooking oil.
Fry bacon, turning, 3-4 minutes, until well browned. Transfer to a plate and keep warm.
Spray same pan with a little more oil. Add eggs and fry 2-3 minutes, until cooked to taste (turn, if desired).
Top bottom half of each bun with a lettuce leaf. Arrange even amounts of bacon and tomato slices on top. Finish with an egg and sauce of choice. Cover with other half of bun and serve.

recipes.title: Pork and sesame burgers
recipes.description: Be a little adventurous with your burger this time. Replace beef with pork and tomato sauce with sweet chilli sauce for an exciting new take on a classic dish.

ingredients.name: chopped fresh coriander roots and stems
ingredients.raw: 2 tablespoon chopped fresh coriander roots and stems

ingredients.name: small fresh red chilli, seeded, chopped finely
ingredients.raw: 1 small fresh red chilli, seeded, chopped finely
1/4 cup lightly packed fresh coriander leaves

steps: Combine pork, egg, breadcrumbs, fish sauce, paste, coriander roots and stems, chilli and half the green onion in a medium bowl. Mix thoroughly with your hands until well combined and sticky. Divide the mixture into four portions; shape portions into large flat patties. Sprinkle both sides of patties with sesame seeds; press seeds firmly into the patties.

Meanwhile, heat the flat plate of a barbecue over medium-high heat. Drizzle the oil over the barbecue plate. Cook the patties for 4 minutes, then turn and cook for a further 3-4 minutes on the other side. The patties should be browned and cooked through.

Split each bread roll in half; grill or toast each side. Place some carrot on the base of each bun, then top with a patty, bean sprouts, remaining onion and coriander leaves. Drizzle with sweet chilli sauce and top with the remaining bread.

recipes.title: Juicy Lucy burger
recipes.description: Everyone loves a burger and with this version you'll be fighting them off. They're packed with flavour and they beat the local takeaway hands down.

ingredients.name: burger buns, split, toasted cup dijon mustard
ingredients.raw: 8 burger buns, split, toasted cup (95g) dijon mustard

ingredients.name: large_piece tomatoes , sliced cup tomato sauce
ingredients.raw: 2 large_piece tomatoes (440g), sliced cup (120g) tomato sauce (ketchup)

steps: Combine beef, worcestershire sauce and garlic in a large bowl. Season. Divide into 16 portions. Using oiled or damp hands, form each portion into a thin 9cm (3¾-inch) pattie. Combine cheeses in a bowl. Place ¼ cup cheese over eight patties, leaving a 1cm (½-inch) border. Place remaining patties on top; pinch edges to seal in cheese. (Patties should now be 10cm/4 inches.)
Heat oil in a large frying pan over medium heat; cook patties, in batches, for 3 minutes one side and 2 minutes on the other side, or until cooked through.
Spread buns with mustard; fill with lettuce, tomato, patties, sauce, gherkin and onion.

recipes.title: Teriyaki chicken rice burger
recipes.description: Sick of boring old hamburgers? Impress the family with this delicious teriyaki chicken and rice burger.
steps: Preheat oven to 200°C/400°F.

Cook rice in large saucepan of boiling water until tender; drain. Spread warm rice in lightly oiled 40cm x 25cm (16-inch x 10-inch) baking tray; smooth surface with damp hands. Sprinkle with seeds; press down to adhere. Cool to room temperature.

Cut rounds from rice using 9cm (3¾-inch) cutter; place on oven tray lined with baking (parchment) paper. Spray with cooking oil; bake 15 minutes. Turn; bake another 15 minutes or until slightly crisp. Keep warm.
Meanwhile, heat oil in large frying pan; cook chicken, skin-side down, until golden. Turn; cook until browned and cooked through. Remove from pan.
Bring sauce, mirin, sake and sugar to the boil in same pan. Reduce heat; simmer until sauce thickens. Return chicken to pan; turn to coat.
Sandwich chicken, cucumber, rocket and mayonnaise between rice rounds.

recipes.title: Zucchini burger
recipes.description: A healthy and vegetarian zucchini burger with beetroot and tomato relish.

ingredients.name: finely chopped fresh flat-leaf parsley
ingredients.raw: 1 tablespoon finely chopped fresh flat-leaf parsley

steps: Place zucchini in strainer; squeeze excess water from zucchini. Combine zucchini, breadcrumbs, cheese, green onion, egg white and parsley in medium bowl; season. Shape mixture into two patties.
Spray medium frying pan with cooking oil; cook brown onion, stirring, about 10 minutes or until browned lightly. Remove from pan.
Cook patties in same pan until browned both sides and heated through.
Sandwich lettuce, patties, onion, beetroot and relish between bun halves.

recipes.title: Lentil and bean burger
steps: Make chilli tomato relish. Cook tomato, onion and garlic in small saucepan, stirring, about 10 minutes or until tomato has softened. Add sauce and vinegar, bring to the boil. Reduce heat, simmer, uncovered, stirring occasionally, about 10 minutes or until relish thickens. Cool 15 minutes.
Meanwhile, cook lentils in medium saucepan of boiling water until tender, drain. Cool 10 minutes.
Blend or process lentils, beans and egg until smooth. Combine in medium bowl with onion, coriander and breadcrumbs, season to taste. Cover, refrigerate 1 hour.

Using floured hands, shape lentil mixture into four patties, cook patties in large heated lightly oiled non-stick frying pan until browned both sides and heated through. Remove from pan, cover to keep warm.
Split buns in half, toast cut-sides of buns. Spread buns with relish, sandwich lettuce, sprouts, cucumber, patties and remaining relish between buns. chilli

recipes.title: Vegetable burgers

ingredients.name: fresh flat-leaf parsley, chopped finely
ingredients.raw: 3 tablespoon fresh flat-leaf parsley, chopped finely

steps: In a large non-stick skillet, heat oil on medium heat; cook onion, capsicum, mushrooms, garlic and lentils, stirring, for about 3-5 minutes, or until vegetables are soft.

Add broth; bring to the boil. Reduce heat; simmer, uncovered, stirring occasionally, for about 10 minutes or until lentils are tender and broth is absorbed. Remove from heat. Stir in rice, parsley, flour and half of the carrot. Stand to cool.

When lentil mixture is cool enough to handle, use hands to shape it into six burger-shaped patties. In same skillet, cook patties, in batches, for about 5-10 minutes, or until patties are browned both sides and heated through.
Meanwhile, split bread rolls in half; toast, cut-side up, until browned lightly.
Just before serving, place patties with remaining carrots, beetroot, sprouts, tomato and sauce in rolls.

recipes.title: Gourmet beef burgers
recipes.description: Use the best quality mince you can for these gourmet beef burgers, you'll be glad you did once you taste them!

ingredients.name: finely chopped fresh flat-leaf parsley
ingredients.raw: 2 tablespoon finely chopped fresh flat-leaf parsley

ingredients.name: drained, sliced sun-dried tomatoes in oil
ingredients.raw: 2 tablespoon drained, sliced sun-dried tomatoes in oil

steps: Combine mince, breadcrumbs, parsley and 1½ tablespoons of the paste in large bowl. Shape mixture into four patties.
Cook patties on heated oiled grill plate (or grill or barbecue) until browned and cooked through. Top patties with cheese; cook until cheese melts.
Combine remaining paste and mayonnaise in small bowl.
Split rolls in half. Place each half cut-side down onto grill plate; cook until lightly toasted.
Sandwich patties, mayonnaise mixture, mesclun, onion and sliced tomatoes between bread rolls.

recipes.title: Salmon and zucchini burgers with green hummus

ingredients.name: gram skinless, boneless salmon fillet, chopped coarsely
ingredients.raw: 500 gram skinless, boneless salmon fillet, chopped coarsely

ingredients.name: chopped coarsely
ingredients.raw: 1/3 cup fresh flat-leaf parsley, chopped coarsely

steps: Combine zucchini and salt in a small bowl; stand 5 minutes. Squeeze excess liquid from zucchini.
Pulse salmon in a food processor into 1cm pieces. Add zucchini, onion, garlic, egg, cumin and half the herbs; pulse until well combined (pulse in short quick bursts to ensure you don't overmix).
To make ⅔ cup fresh breadcrumbs, remove the crust from three 1.5cm thick slices of wholemeal bread; process slices until they become coarse crumbs.

Add breadcrumbs, pulse until combined; season. (The mixture will be quite wet but will firm on chilling.) Using damp hands, shape mixture into four 10cm patties. Place on a baking-paper-lined tray. Cover; refrigerate 30 minutes.
Meanwhile, make green hummus. Process hummus and remaining herbs in processor until smooth. Add yoghurt; pulse until combined.
Heat oil in a large frying pan over medium heat; cook patties for 3 minutes each side or until just cooked through.
Place lettuce, patties, green hummus and tomato between toasted rolls.

recipes.title: Chicken fried rice
recipes.description: This Asian inspired dinner is quick, simple and SO tasty!

ingredients.name: x 250g packaged 90-second microwave white basmati rice
ingredients.raw: 2 x 250g packaged 90-second microwave white basmati rice

steps: Heat 1 teaspoon of the oil in a large wok over high heat. Pour egg into wok; cook, tilting wok, until omelette is just set. Remove omelette from wok; chop coarsely.
Heat 3 teaspoons of the remaining oil in wok; stir-fry chicken for 2 minutes or until browned. Remove from wok.
Heat remaining oil in wok; stir-fry capsicum, half the onion, cabbage, mushrooms, garlic and chilli for 3 minutes or until vegetables soften.
Return chicken and egg to wok with rice, sesame oil, soy sauce, onion and 2 tablespoons of the sweet chilli sauce; stir-fry until heated through. (Taste and add extra soy sauce if desired.)
Serve rice, drizzled with remaining sweet chilli sauce and sprinkled with coriander and remaining onion.

recipes.title: Easy beef stroganoff
recipes.description: We've given classic beef stroganoff a family-style upgrade with a one-pot cooking method that includes pasta and mince to deliver a dinner fave from kitchen to table in 30 minutes.

ingredients.name: extra virgin olive oil
ingredients.raw: ¼ cup (60ml) extra virgin olive oil

steps: Heat oil in pan over high heat. Cook mushrooms, for 4 minutes, stirring occasionally until light golden. Add the onion, garlic and mince, cook, stirring to break up mince for 5 minutes until beef is browned.

Stir in paprika, tomato paste, Worcestershire sauce and mustard. Season with sea salt and freshly ground pepper. Add pasta and stock to pan. Bring to the boil, reduce heat to medium-low, cover and cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally to prevent pasta sticking to bottom of pan.

Meanwhile, finely chop chives and half the parsley, pick the remaining parsley leaves. Stir sour cream and chopped parsley into pasta and cook, uncovered for 2 minutes or until pasta is al dente. Season. Serve scattered with chives and parsley leaves.

recipes.title: Julie Goodwin’s quick orecchiette pasta
recipes.description: This 5-ingredient dinner is ready in 20 minutes.

ingredients.name: grated rind and juice of 1 lemon
ingredients.raw: grated rind and juice of 1 lemon

steps: Cook the orecchiette pasta in a large saucepan of boiling well-salted water until just tender.

Place the butter and walnuts in a large frying pan over medium-high heat. Cook until the milk solids turn brown and the walnuts are golden brown. Just before serving, add the lemon rind and juice. (This will stop the browning of the butter so make sure it’s a lovely deep golden brown before adding the lemon.)
Reserve ½ cup cooking water. Drain pasta. Toss the pasta through the sauce, adding the reserved water as needed. Season to taste with salt. Serve orecchiette pasta immediately, topped with parmesan.

recipes.title: Easy chicken and corn soup
recipes.description: This quick and easy soup is perfect for camping or a fuss-free weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: pouring cream or evaporated milk
ingredients.raw: ¾ cup (180ml) pouring cream or evaporated milk

steps: Heat butter in a large saucepan or camp oven over medium heat. Cook onion, stirring, until softened.

Add creamed corn, corn kernels, stock and the water. Bring to the boil; simmer, covered, for 20 minutes. Add chicken, zucchini and cream; simmer for 5 minutes or until hot. Season to taste. Serve with your favourite toasted sourdough, if you like.

recipes.title: Green masala chicken curry
recipes.description: There's something so satisfying about making a curry from scratch.

ingredients.name: fresh coriander, roots, stems and leaves chopped coarsely
ingredients.raw: 2 bunches (130g) fresh coriander, roots, stems and leaves chopped coarsely

ingredients.name: loosely packed fresh mint leaves
ingredients.raw: 1 cup loosely packed fresh mint leaves

ingredients.name: grams baby spinach leaves, plus extra to serve
ingredients.raw: 120 grams baby spinach leaves, plus extra to serve

ingredients.name: fresh jalapeño chilli, seeds removed, chopped coarsely
ingredients.raw: 1 fresh jalapeño chilli, seeds removed, chopped coarsely

ingredients.name: natural flaked almonds, roasted
ingredients.raw: ⅓ cup (25g) natural flaked almonds, roasted

ingredients.name: steamed brown rice and lime wedges, to serve
ingredients.raw: steamed brown rice and lime wedges, to serve

steps: Reserve a handful of coriander leaves and mint leaves for serving. Blend or process remaining coriander and mint with spinach, chilli, garlic, juice and the water until smooth.

Heat ghee or oil in a large deep-frying pan over medium-high heat; cook onion, stirring, for 5 minutes or until starting to brown. Add chicken; cook for 5 minutes or until chicken is browned on both sides. Add spices; cook, stirring, for 1 minute or until fragrant.
Stir in coriander puree and coconut cream; bring to the boil. Reduce heat to low; simmer for 20 minutes or until sauce thickens slightly and chicken is cooked through. Season to taste.
Top curry with extra spinach leaves, reserved coriander and mint leaves, and almonds; serve with rice and lime wedges.

recipes.title: Fresh pesto pasta
recipes.description: Simply delicious.

ingredients.name: 1, firmly packed
ingredients.raw: 1 1/2 cup fresh basil leaves, firmly packed

steps: In a small frying pan, melt butter and add pine nuts, stir over medium heat until nuts are lightly browned, drain on absorbent paper; cool.

Process pine nuts, basil, garlic, cheese and sugar. Add oil in thin stream while motor is operating, process until combined. Season with salt and freshly ground black pepper. Add pasta gradually to large saucepan of boiling water, boil, uncovered, until pasta is just tender, drain. Return pasta to saucepan, add pesto, toss gently over low heat until heated through.

recipes.title: Quick chicken casserole
recipes.description: A tasty meal that can be on the table in under an hour.
steps: Heat oil in a large casserole dish over medium heat. Add potato and onion, cut-sides down; cook for 1½ minutes each side or until browned. Add garlic and thyme; stir for 1 minute or until fragrant; remove vegetables and thyme from pan.

Make 3 deep cuts into the skin-side of each cutlet. Heat same pan over high heat; cook chicken, skin-side down, for 2 minutes, turn, cook for a further 2 minutes or until browned. Top with potato mixture.

Add lemon juice, wine and stock to pan; season well. Bring to the boil, reduce heat to medium; simmer, covered, for 10 minutes. Add tomatoes; cook for a further 5 minutes or until chicken is cooked through and potato is tender.
Remove from heat; stir in spinach. Serve casserole sprinkled with parsley, and accompany with crusty bread to mop up the cooking juices.

recipes.title: Chickpea shakshuka
recipes.description: This Moroccan-inspired chickpea shakshuka dish has a spicy kick to it.

ingredients.name: fresh long red chilli, chopped finely
ingredients.raw: 1 fresh long red chilli, chopped finely

ingredients.name: gram canned chickpeas , drained, rinsed
ingredients.raw: 400 gram canned chickpeas (garbanzo beans), drained, rinsed

steps: Heat a large, deep ovenproof frying pan over a medium heat; cook seeds and paprika, stirring, for 1 minute or until fragrant. Add oil, garlic and chilli; cook for 1 minute or until fragrant.

Add onion and capsicum; cook, stirring, for 8 minutes or until onion is softened. Add chickpeas, tomatoes, the water, harrisa and sugar; bring to the boil. Reduce heat; simmer, for 5 minutes or until vegetables are tender and liquid has thickened slightly.

Using a spoon, make four shallow indents in the tomato mixture. Crack 1 egg into each hole. Cook, covered, on low heat, for 5 minutes or until whites are set and yolks still remain runny, or until cooked to your liking. Serve topped with coriander.
Serve with baked chia seed mountain bread wraps and chilli oil. Preheat oven to 220°C. Spray wraps with cooking oil; cut wraps into quarters. Bake for 8 minutes or until golden and crisp.

recipes.title: Speedy tofu laksa
recipes.description: Meat-free meal made in minutes - and a delicious way to eat fried tofu!

ingredients.name: gai lan , trimmed, cut into 5cm lengths
ingredients.raw: 1 bunch gai lan (500g), trimmed, cut into 5cm (2in) lengths

ingredients.name: fresh long red chilli, sliced thinly
ingredients.raw: 1 fresh long red chilli, sliced thinly

ingredients.name: fresh kaffir lime leaf, rib removed
ingredients.raw: 1 fresh kaffir lime leaf, rib removed

ingredients.name: centimetre stick fresh lemongrass , chopped coarsely
ingredients.raw: 10 centimetre (4-inch) stick fresh lemongrass (20g), chopped coarsely

steps: Place noodles in a medium heatproof bowl; cover with boiling water. Stand for 1½ minutes or until almost tender; drain.

Meanwhile, cook laksa paste in a large heavy-based saucepan over medium heat, stirring, for 3 minutes or until fragrant. Stir in coconut milk and 1½ cups (375ml) water; bring to a simmer over medium heat.
Add tofu puffs to laksa mixture with gai lan. Simmer, stirring occasionally, for 2 minutes until gai lan is just tender.
Divide noodles and laksa mixture among bowls. Scatter with sprouts, fried shallots, chilli and coriander. Serve with lime wedges.
Blend or process ingredients until mixture forms a paste.

recipes.title: Pork and veal san choy bow
recipes.description: Fresh and flavour-packed, try this on for a midweek dinner or easy workday lunch.

ingredients.name: gram minced pork and veal mixture
ingredients.raw: 750 gram minced (ground) pork and veal mixture

ingredients.name: butter lettuce leaves, from the middle of the lettuce
ingredients.raw: 12 butter (boston) lettuce leaves, from the middle of the lettuce

steps: Heat a wok over medium-high heat. Add peanut oil, onion, carrot, celery, garlic and ginger; stir-fry for 5 minutes or until just softened.

Add mince, stir-fry for 5 minutes, breaking up any lumps, or until browned. Stir in sesame oil and sauces; cook for 3 minutes or until syrupy and heated through. Cool for 10 minutes; stir in half the green onion.
To serve, spoon mixture into lettuce cups; top with peanuts, remaining green onion and coriander.

recipes.title: Linguine with garlic prawns
recipes.description: It's shrimply the best.

ingredients.name: small red chillies, seeded, sliced thinly
ingredients.raw: 2 small red chillies, seeded, sliced thinly

ingredients.name: finely chopped fresh flat-leaf parsley, plus extra to serve
ingredients.raw: 2 tablespoon finely chopped fresh flat-leaf parsley, plus extra to serve

steps: Shell and devein prawns. Butterfly prawns by cutting along the centre back without cutting all the way through.
Cook the pasta in a large saucepan of rapidly boiling salted water until al dente. Reserve ½ cup cooking water; drain.
Meanwhile, heat 1 tablespoon of the oil in a large frying pan over high heat; cook the prawns for 1-2 minutes or until just cooked through. Remove from pan.
Add remaining oil, garlic and chilli to pan; cook over medium-high heat for 1 minute or until fragrant but not coloured.

Add the cooked pasta, prawns and chopped parsley to garlic mixture in pan. Toss to combine, adding a splash of the reserved pasta cooking water if necessary. Serve with lemon halves and extra parsley.

recipes.title: Rice-cooker bibimbap
recipes.description: Make quickly and easily at home in your rice cooker!
steps: Rinse rice under running water until water runs clear.
Set rice cooker to sauté or regular cook function. Add 2 teaspoons of the oil to cooker; cook carrot and zucchini, stirring, for 2 minutes or until slightly softened. Remove from cooker.
Heat another 2 teaspoons of oil in cooker; cook beef and garlic, stirring, for 5 minutes or until browned. Stir in sauce and sugar; remove from cooker, cover to keep warm.
Place another 2 teaspoons of the oil, rice, extra garlic, half of the kimchi and the boiling water in the cooker; stir to combine then close lid. Set to regular cook function.
In the last 5 minutes of the cooking time, top the kimchi mixture with zucchini, carrot, beef, bean sprouts and remaining kimchi, keeping each ingredient separate.
To serve, place the egg yolks into the centre of the bibimbap and stir to combine; drizzle with the extra oil.

recipes.title: Vegetarian nachos
recipes.description: Red beans and mushrooms, oh my!

ingredients.name: medium red capsicum , chopped finely
ingredients.raw: 1 medium red capsicum (bell pepper) (200g), chopped finely

ingredients.name: grams button mushrooms, sliced thickly
ingredients.raw: 200 grams (6½ ounces) button mushrooms, sliced thickly

ingredients.name: grams swiss brown mushrooms, sliced thickly
ingredients.raw: 200 grams (6½ ounces) swiss brown mushrooms, sliced thickly

ingredients.name: grams canned kidney beans, drained, rinsed
ingredients.raw: 400 grams (12½ ounces) canned kidney beans, drained, rinsed

ingredients.name: grams canned corn kernels, drained, rinsed
ingredients.raw: 300 grams (9½ ounces) canned corn kernels, drained, rinsed

ingredients.name: grams bottled mild thick and chunky salsa
ingredients.raw: 375 grams (12 ounces) bottled mild thick and chunky salsa
1/2 cup loosely packed fresh coriander (cilantro) sprigs

steps: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat; cook onion, capsicum and mushrooms, stirring, for 5 minutes or until softened. Add taco seasoning; cook, stirring, 1 minute or until fragrant.
Add beans, corn, and salsa to pan; bring to the boil. Reduce heat to low; simmer, 5 minutes or until sauce thickens. Season to taste.
Meanwhile, preheat grill (broiler).
Place corn chips in a large ovenproof dish (or into four ovenproof serving dishes); sprinkle with cheese. Grill about 3 minutes or until cheese melts.
Serve corn chips immediately, topped with bean mixture, guacamole, sour cream and coriander.

recipes.title: Pepperoni pizza
recipes.description: Don't order delivery when homemade tastes this good.
steps: Preheat oven to 240°C. Oil two oven or pizza trays; place in heated oven.
Place pizza bases on trays, spread with sauce; sprinkle with 1/2 cup of pizza cheese. Top with pepperoni and capsicum; sprinkle with remaining cheese; season.
Bake pizzas 15 minutes, or until bases are browned and crisp.

recipes.title: Tuna mac ‘n’ cheese
recipes.description: A classic dish with a fishy twist!

ingredients.name: 3, drained
ingredients.raw: 1 3/4 cup (350g) roasted red capsicum strips in oil, drained

ingredients.name: gram canned tuna in spring water, drained
ingredients.raw: 425 gram canned tuna in spring water, drained

steps: Preheat oven to 200°C (180°C fan). Oil 6 x 1½-cup (375ml) ovenproof dishes.
Cook pasta in a large saucepan of boiling water until just tender; drain.

Combine pasta, capsicum, tuna, asparagus and sauce in a large bowl; spoon mixture into dishes. Sprinkle with combined cheese and breadcrumbs. Bake for 10 minutes or until browned and heated through. Sprinkle with parsley.

recipes.title: Ham, egg and cheese toasties
recipes.description: Start your day off right.
steps: Preheat sandwich press. Sandwich sliced ham, thinly sliced hard-boiled egg and coarsely grated cheddar cheese between 2 slices wholemeal bread, season. Toast in sandwich press. Serve with barbecue sauce, if you like.

recipes.title: Grilled vegetable and ricotta stack
recipes.description: What better way to get your five-a-day than this colourful and healthy vegetable and ricotta stack.

ingredients.raw: 1/2 cup firmly packed fresh basil leaves

steps: Cook eggplant, capsicums, zucchini and mushrooms, in batches, on heated oiled grill plate (or grill or barbecue) until tender.
Meanwhile, combine cheese, garlic, herbs and rind in medium bowl.

For the semi-dried tomato pesto, blend or process tomato and basil until mixture forms a paste. With motor operating, gradually add combined vinegar and water in thin, steady stream until pesto is smooth.
Divide mushrooms, stem-side up, among serving plates; layer with cheese mixture then random slices of eggplant, zucchini and capsicums. Drizzle with pesto; sprinkle with nuts.

recipes.title: Brown fried rice with carrot, cabbage and red onion
recipes.description: Get your five-a-day.

ingredients.name: medium red onion , cut into wedges
ingredients.raw: 1 medium red onion (170g), cut into wedges

ingredients.name: fresh long red chilli, sliced thinly
ingredients.raw: 1 fresh long red chilli, sliced thinly

steps: Cook rice in a medium saucepan of boiling salted water 35 minutes or until tender; drain. Rinse under cold water; drain well.

Meanwhile, heat a large wok on medium-high heat; add 1 teaspoon of the oil, swirl to coat wok. Add egg; swirl wok to make a thin omelette. Cook 30 seconds or until just set; slide omelette onto a clean board. Roll tightly; cut into strips.
Thinly slice carrots on the diagonal.

Heat remaining oil in same wok; stir-fry carrot and red onion 4 minutes or until just tender. Add cabbage; stir-fry 2 minutes or until wilted. Add garlic, ginger and half the green onion; stir-fry until fragrant. Add rice and sauce; stir-fry until hot.
Serve fried rice topped with omelette strips, chilli and remaining green onion.

recipes.title: Eggs in bread with wilted spinach and hollandaise sauce
recipes.description: Give the classic breakfast a touch of style.
steps: Make hollandaise sauce. Bring vinegar, juice and peppercorns to the boil in small saucepan. Reduce heat, simmer, uncovered, until liquid is reduced by half. Strain through a fine sieve into small heatproof bowl, cool 10 minutes. Whisk egg yolks into vinegar mixture. Set bowl over small saucepan of simmering water, do not allow water to touch base of bowl. Whisk mixture over heat until thickened. Remove bowl from heat, gradually whisk in melted butter in a thin steady stream, whisking constantly until sauce is thick and creamy. Whisk in the water. Keep warm, off the heat, over saucepan of hot water.

Cut 7cm (2¾-inch) round from the centre of each slice of bread. Discard rounds. Melt one quarter of the butter in large frying pan, cook two slices of bread until browned on one side. Turn bread, crack one egg into the centre of each piece of bread. Cook over low heat, until egg white just sets. Using spatula, gently lift toast onto serving plates, cover to keep warm. Repeat with remaining butter, bread and eggs.
Meanwhile, boil, steam or microwave spinach until wilted. Season with salt and pepper.
Serve eggs in toast with spinach and sauce.

recipes.title: Free-form mushroom and cheese tart
recipes.description: With a rustic charm, this easy tart is perfect for those new to the world of pastries.

ingredients.name: swiss brown mushrooms, sliced thinly
ingredients.raw: 400 g swiss brown mushrooms, sliced thinly

ingredients.name: spring onion and chive cream cheese, softened
ingredients.raw: 200 g spring onion and chive cream cheese, softened
1/4 cup coarsely chopped fresh flat-leaf parsley

ingredients.name: fresh ricotta, crumbled coarsely
ingredients.raw: 100 g fresh ricotta, crumbled coarsely (see cook's notes)
1/2 cup (120g) smooth packaged ricotta (see cook's notes)
1/4 cup loosely packed fresh flat-leaf parsley sprigs

steps: Preheat oven to 220°C/200°C fan. Line two oven trays with baking paper.

Heat half the butter and half the oil in a large heavy-based frying pan over high heat. Add half the mushrooms and half the shallots; season. Cook, stirring occasionally, for 4 minutes or until mushrooms are golden. Transfer to a medium bowl. Repeat with remaining butter, oil, mushrooms and shallots.
Meanwhile, process cream cheese, eggs and parmesan until smooth.

Place a pastry sheet on each oven tray. Spread cream cheese mixture evenly between sheets, into a 16cm round, leaving a 4cm border; top with mushroom mixture and chopped parsley. Brush the border with a little of the extra egg. Fold in pastry corners, then remaining sides to partially cover the filling and create a rim. Brush pastry rim with a little more egg. Sprinkle crumbled ricotta and thyme over filling.
Bake tarts for 15 minutes or until pastry is puffed and golden. Serve tarts topped with spoonfuls of smooth ricotta and parsley sprigs.

recipes.title: Zucchini, carrot and corn fritters with avocado and coriander salsa
recipes.description: Fresh, hot fritters just can't be beaten.
steps: Trim husk and silk from corn. Using a sharp knife, remove corn kernels; you need ½ cup. Cook corn in small saucepan of boiling water until tender; drain, cool.
Coarsely grate zucchini; squeeze out excess moisture. Peel and coarsely grate carrot. Separate egg. Combine zucchini, carrot, corn, egg yolk, flour and the water in medium bowl; season.
Beat egg white in small bowl with electric mixer until soft peaks form. Fold egg white into fritter mixture. Shape mixture into 6 fritters.
Heat oil in large frying pan; cook fritters, in batches, about 2 minutes each side or until browned and cooked through.
Meanwhile, make avocado and coriander salsa. Peel and seed avocado. Coarsely chop avocado and tomato; combine with juice and coriander in small bowl, season to taste.
Serve fritters with salsa.

recipes.title: Healthy vegetarian bean nachos
recipes.description: Dinner is nacho problem now!

ingredients.name: gram canned kidney beans, rinsed, drained
ingredients.raw: 810 gram canned kidney beans, rinsed, drained

steps: Preheat oven to 220°C/425°F.
Combine half the beans with salsa in a medium bowl; mash until chunky. Stir in remaining beans and coriander.
Spread half the chips in a medium shallow baking dish; top with half the cheese and half the bean mixture. Top with remaining chips, cheese then remaining bean mixture. Bake for 10 minutes.
Place lettuce, tomato and avocado in a medium bowl with juice; toss gently to combine. Season to taste.
Serve nachos topped with salad.

recipes.title: Honey soy chicken
recipes.description: A little bit sweet, a litle bit salty and a whole lot tasty.

ingredients.name: gram chicken breast fillets, sliced thinly
ingredients.raw: 700 gram chicken breast fillets, sliced thinly

ingredients.name: dry roasted peanuts, chopped coarsely
ingredients.raw: 2 tablespoon dry roasted peanuts, chopped coarsely

ingredients.name: fresh long red chilli, sliced thinly
ingredients.raw: 1 fresh long red chilli, sliced thinly

steps: Combine honey, sauce, five-spice, sherry, garlic and ginger in a small screw-top jar; shake well. Place chicken in a medium bowl, combine with half the honey mixture; cover, refrigerate for 3 hours or overnight. Reserve the remaining honey mixture, covered, in the fridge.
Drain chicken, discard marinade. Heat half the oil in a wok; stir-fry chicken and onion, in batches, until chicken is browned. Remove from wok.

Heat remaining oil in wok; stir-fry seeds until browned lightly. Return chicken to wok with pak choy, choy sum and reserved honey mixture; stir-fry until vegetables are just wilted. Sprinkle with peanuts and chilli to serve.

recipes.title: Spiced fish tacos with slaw and avocado cream
recipes.description: For a lighter taco, try fish!

ingredients.name: spiced fish tacos with slaw & avocado cream
ingredients.raw: Spiced fish tacos with slaw & avocado cream

ingredients.name: gram firm white skinless fish fillets, cut into long pieces
ingredients.raw: 625 gram firm white skinless fish fillets, cut into long pieces

ingredients.name: loosely packed fresh coriander leaves
ingredients.raw: 2 cup loosely packed fresh coriander leaves

ingredients.name: fresh long green chilli, seeded, thinly sliced
ingredients.raw: 1 fresh long green chilli, seeded, thinly sliced
1/4 cup (60 millilitres) freshly squeezed orange juice

steps: Cut the fish fillets lengthways on the diagonal into 1.5cm wide, 12cm-long strips.
In a medium bowl, combine fish, allspice, thyme, cayenne pepper, cinnamon, garlic powder and oil. Season. Cover; refrigerate until required.
Blend or process avocado, sour cream and lime juice until smooth. Season to taste.
In a large bowl, combine cabbage, coriander, onion, chilli, orange juice and garlic. Season to taste.
Heat a large, non-stick frying pan over medium; heat tortillas, in batches, 15 seconds each side. Wrap tortillas in foil to keep warm.
Increase heat to high; cook fish in same pan, in two batches, 4 minutes or until just cooked.
Serve warm tortilla filled with fish and slaw, topped with avocado cream.

recipes.title: Rigatoni with arrabbiata and  chorizo sauce
recipes.description: A classic flavour combination the whole family will love.

ingredients.raw: 1/2 cup coarsely chopped fresh  flat-leaf parsley

steps: Cook pasta in a large saucepan of boiling water until almost tender; drain, return to pan.
Meanwhile, cook chorizo in a large frying pan over medium-high heat, turning occasionally, for 2 minutes or until chorizo is browned; remove from pan, drain on paper towel.

Add oil to same frying pan; cook onion, chilli and garlic, stirring, for 3 minutes or until onion has softened. Add passata, the water and sugar. Bring to the boil, reduce heat to low; simmer, stirring occasionally, for 7 minutes or until the sauce has thickened slightly. Season to taste with salt.
Add sauce to pasta in pan with parsley; stir over medium heat until heated through. Stir in parmesan.

recipes.title: Basic sausage rolls
recipes.description: Whip up a batch of these tasty sausage rolls for parties, lunch or dinner with the family.
steps: Preheat oven to 220°C. Line oven trays with baking paper.
Combine onion, breadcrumbs, sausage mince and beef, egg, paste, sauce and parsley in a large bowl.

Cut pastry sheets in half lengthways. Place equal amounts of filling mixture lengthways along centre of each pastry piece (see tips); roll each pastry piece, from one wide edge, to enclose filling. Cut each roll into six pieces; place rolls, seam-side down, on trays. Brush with extra egg, sprinkle with sesame seeds.
Bake rolls for 25 minutes or until golden and puffed. Serve sausage rolls hot with tomato sauce or chutney, if you like.

recipes.title: Spanakopita quesadillas
recipes.description: How's this for fusion? Delicious Greek spinach and feta pie meets the easy, breezy Mexican quesadilla for a low-GI snack you'll make over and over.

ingredients.name: grams baby spinach leaves, chopped coarsely
ingredients.raw: 200 grams (6½oz) baby spinach leaves, chopped coarsely

steps: Heat oil in a large heavy-based non-stick frying pan over medium heat. Cook onion, garlic and spinach, stirring, for 2 minutes or until softened. Transfer to a large bowl; stand to cool slightly. Wipe pan clean with paper towel.
Add egg, fetta, parmesan, lemon rind and 2 tablespoons of the dill to spinach mixture. Season with pepper; mix well to combine.

Heat frying pan over low heat. Spread a quarter of the spinach mixture over one half of a tortilla; fold over to enclose. Repeat with remaining spinach mixture and tortillas. Cook quesadillas, in batches, for 3 minutes each side or until warmed through and golden.
Combine cucumber, tomato and remaining dill in a medium bowl; season with pepper.
Cut quesadillas into wedges. Serve with cucumber salad, tzatziki and lemon wedges.

recipes.title: Quick chicken nuggets
recipes.description: Moist chicken breast chunks with a crunchy coating will be popular with adults and kids alike and you’ll know exactly what’s in them!

ingredients.name: crinkle-cut oven fries, to serve, optional
ingredients.raw: crinkle-cut oven fries, to serve, optional

steps: Cut the chicken into nugget-sized pieces.

Crush the cornflakes by hand in a medium bowl or in a plastic bag until coarsely crushed. Add the flour, paprika, onion salt, pepper and sugar; season with a little sea salt. Beat the eggs lightly in a medium bowl. Add the extra flour to a third bowl. Dip a few of the chicken pieces at a time into plain flour; shake away the excess flour. Dip the chicken into egg, then into the spiced cornflake mixture. Place the chicken on a plate; repeat with remaining chicken in batches.

Heat about 3cm of oil in a deep frying pan over medium heat. Place a large wire rack over a tray. Shallow-fry the chicken pieces, in batches, for 3-4 minutes, turning occasionally, or until lightly browned all over. Remove from the pan with a slotted spoon; transfer to the rack or drain on paper towels.
Serve the chicken nuggets with crinkle-cut oven fries or potato wedges, if desired.

recipes.title: Quick and easy bouillabaisse
recipes.description: Recreate this classic French seafood soup in no time at all with this quick and tasty weeknight recipe from The Australian Women's Weekly's 'Winter Express' cookbook.

ingredients.name: medium fennel bulb , trimmed, sliced thinly, fronds reserved
ingredients.raw: 1 medium fennel bulb (300g), trimmed, sliced thinly, fronds reserved

ingredients.name: long french bread stick , cut into 1cm slices
ingredients.raw: 1 long french bread stick (300g), cut into 1cm slices

steps: Peel garlic. Keep one clove whole, crush other clove. Combine stock, rind, thyme, whole garlic and saffron in a medium saucepan; bring to the boil. Reduce heat; simmer, covered, about 4 minutes.

Meanwhile, heat oil in a large saucepan over medium-high heat; cook fennel, onion and crushed garlic, stirring, about 2 minutes or until softened. Add prawns and marinara mix; cook, stirring gently, until prawns are almost cooked.
Preheat a grill plate (or grill or barbecue) over high heat. Toast bread on grill plate until browned lightly.
Cook tomatoes on same heated oiled grill plate about 5 minutes or until just softened.
Meanwhile, strain stock mixture into marinara mixture; bring to the boil. Remove from heat, stir in butter. Season to taste.
Divide bouillabaisse into serving bowls; top each bowl with grilled tomatoes and reserved fennel fronds. Sprinkle aïoli with cayenne. Serve bouillabaisse with toast and aïoli.

recipes.title: Pasta with spinach, mushrooms and almonds
recipes.description: This delectable vegetarian pasta is packed with mushrooms, pecorino and crunchy almonds. Delish! It's also good for diabetics.

ingredients.name: firmly packed fresh flat-leaf parsley
ingredients.raw: 1 tablespoon firmly packed fresh flat-leaf parsley

ingredients.name: roasted almonds
ingredients.raw: 1/4 cup (40g) coarsely chopped unsalted, roasted almonds

steps: Cook pasta in a large saucepan of boiling water until tender; reserve ½ cup of the liquid, drain pasta.

Meanwhile, heat oil in a large frying pan over high heat; cook mushrooms and shallot, stirring occasionally, for 5 minutes or until mushrooms are lightly golden and shallot is tender. Add garlic and parsley; cook, stirring, for 1 minute or until garlic is fragrant. Season to taste with black pepper.
Reduce heat to low; toss warm pasta, nuts and spinach through mushroom mixture. Add enough reserved pasta water to lightly coat the pasta. Serve topped with cheese.

recipes.title: Pork and tofu rice noodles
recipes.description: Stir-fry your taste buds to heaven with this staple Asian noodle dish of pork, tofu and beans with chunks of capsicum and oyster mushrooms. This recipe is suitable for diabetics.

ingredients.name: gram lean pork fillet, sliced thinly
ingredients.raw: 150 gram lean pork fillet, sliced thinly

ingredients.name: gram firm tofu, drained, cut into 2.5cm cubes
ingredients.raw: 150 gram firm tofu, drained, cut into 2.5cm cubes

ingredients.name: fresh small red thai chilli, sliced thinly
ingredients.raw: 1 fresh small red thai (serrano) chilli, sliced thinly

ingredients.name: small red onion , cut into thin wedges
ingredients.raw: 1 small red onion (100g), cut into thin wedges

ingredients.name: medium yellow capsicum , sliced thinly
ingredients.raw: 1 medium yellow capsicum (bell pepper) (200g), sliced thinly

ingredients.name: gram oyster mushrooms, halved if large
ingredients.raw: 150 gram oyster mushrooms, halved if large

ingredients.name: loosely packed fresh coriander leaves
ingredients.raw: 1 tablespoon loosely packed fresh coriander leaves (cilantro)

steps: Place noodles in a medium heatproof bowl, cover with boiling water; stand until just tender, drain.
Meanwhile, heat 2 teaspoons of the oil in a wok over high heat; stir-fry pork for 3 minutes or until browned. Remove from wok; cover to keep warm.

Heat the remaining oil in wok over medium-high heat; stir-fry tofu, garlic, chilli, onion and the water for 3 minutes or until onion starts to soften. Add capsicum, beans and mushrooms to wok; stir-fry for 2 minutes. Add the extra water; stir-fry for 1 minute or until vegetables are just tender. Add sauce, pork and noodles; stir-fry until heated through.
Serve stir-fry topped with coriander.

recipes.title: Vietnamese pork stir-fry
recipes.description: This quick stir-fry is all about the heat and the crunch. Accompanied with steamed rice, this recipe is an ideal mid-week dinner plan.

ingredients.name: lemongrass, white section only, finely chopped
ingredients.raw: 2 stalks lemongrass, white section only, finely chopped

ingredients.name: large red chillies, seeded, chopped finely
ingredients.raw: 2 large red chillies, seeded, chopped finely

steps: Combine the fish sauce, soy sauce, sugar, lemongrass and garlic in a large bowl and stir until the sugar has dissolved. Add the pork; stir to coat. Cover and set aside to marinate for 30 minutes.

Heat the oil in a wok over a high flame and when it begins to shimmer add the onion. Cook, stirring, until caramelised and golden brown, then add half the pork. Cook, stirring, for 1 minute, then remove and set aside. Add the remaining pork and cook for 1 minute. Remove and set aside.

Add chilli and capsicum and cook, stirring, for 1 minute. Return pork to the wok and add the lime juice and peanuts. Toss for a minute, then top with fresh mint leaves and serve with steamed rice, if desired.

recipes.title: Quinoa salad with haloumi and pomegranate

ingredients.name: loosely packed
ingredients.raw: 1/2 cup fresh mint leaves, loosely packed

ingredients.name: gram haloumi, cut into 1cm slices
ingredients.raw: 250 gram (8 ounces) haloumi, cut into 1cm (½-inch) slices

steps: Bring quinoa and water to the boil in a medium saucepan, cook, covered, over low heat for 15 minutes or until tender. Drain, cool slightly.
Combine garlic, juice, spices and 1 tablespoon of the oil in a large bowl, season to taste. Add quinoa to bowl with mint, spinach leaves and seeds, toss gently to combine.
Heat remaining oil in a large frying pan over high heat, cook haloumi for 1 minute each side or until golden.
Serve quinoa salad topped with haloumi, yoghurt and pomegranate seeds.

recipes.title: Spanish spicy pork and veal meatballs

ingredients.name: gram minced pork and veal mixture
ingredients.raw: 750 gram minced pork and veal mixture
1/2 cup finely chopped fresh flat-leaf parsley

ingredients.name: each ground turmeric and nutmeg
ingredients.raw: 1 teaspoon each ground turmeric and nutmeg

ingredients.name: extra
ingredients.raw: 1/4 cup loosely packed fresh flat-leaf parsley leaves, extra

steps: Heat 2 teaspoons of the oil in a deep, large frying pan over high heat; cook onion and thyme, stirring, until onion softens. Remove from pan.
Combine the pork and veal, breadcrumbs, cheese, parsley, eggs, garlic and spices in a large bowl; season. Using damp hands, roll the mixture into 12 balls.
Heat remaining oil in the same pan; cook the meatballs, turning, until well browned all over.
Return onion mixture to pan with passata; bring to the boil. Reduce heat; simmer, uncovered, about 5 minutes or until meatballs are cooked through. Sprinkle over extra parsley.
